4428848806,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-experis-nederland-4428848806?position=2&pageNum=0&refId=WCtsJAku1XDfauxdtcA31Q%3D%3D&trackingId=pW2PRtRP6v2jApcE0jFc4Q%3D%3D,Data Analyst,Experis Nederland,"The Hague, South Holland, Netherlands","As a Data Analyst within the Asset Finance EPT (Empowered Product Team) you will play a key role in enabling a data-driven Originate-to-Distribute (OtD) business. Based in The Hague, you will support our Asset Finance professionals by ensuring that data is accurate, reliable, and translated into meaningful insights for both internal stakeholders and external investors. In this role, you will work at the intersection of business, data, and technology, contributing directly to the quality of our reporting, the robustness of our data chain, and the continuous improvement of our Asset Finance processes. Work is hybrid and the official location for this job is The Hague.
Responsibilities
You will conduct data analysis and delivery and support the functional support team’s day-to-day operations, including frequent meetings with users. Other responsibilities include:
Managing the applications.
Working towards team goals and supporting everyday processes and testing for colleagues in your Asset Finance team EPT.
Driving continuous improvements and process automation.
Executing Security Operations tasks to ensure that processes and applications are securely managed and in control.
Qualifications
Experience with data analysis (SQL, Excel, Power BI or similar tools).
Strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills, with the ability to break down complex issues into manageable components.
Affinity with financial data (e.g. loans, portfolios, cashflows).
A structured and methodical approach to analyzing data and identifying root causes.
Ability to communicate insights clearly to both technical and business stakeholders.
A proactive mindset with a focus on continuous improvement.
Fluent in English, Dutch is a preference.
Please note that for this role you need to be already situated in the Netherlands.
For more information, please contact Ritsa (ritsa.paraskevopoulou@experis.nl).

As a Data Analyst within the Asset Finance EPT (Empowered Product Team) you will play a key role in enabling a data-driven Originate-to-Distribute (OtD) business. Based in The Hague, you will support our Asset Finance professionals by ensuring that data is accurate, reliable, and translated into meaningful insights for both internal stakeholders and external investors. In this role, you will work at the intersection of business, data, and technology, contributing directly to the quality of our reporting, the robustness of our data chain, and the continuous improvement of our Asset Finance processes. Work is hybrid and the official location for this job is The Hague.



Responsibilities

  • You will conduct data analysis and delivery and support the functional support team’s day-to-day operations, including frequent meetings with users. Other responsibilities include:
  • Managing the applications.
  • Working towards team goals and supporting everyday processes and testing for colleagues in your Asset Finance team EPT.
  • Driving continuous improvements and process automation.
  • Executing Security Operations tasks to ensure that processes and applications are securely managed and in control.



Qualifications


  • Experience with data analysis (SQL, Excel, Power BI or similar tools).
  • Strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills, with the ability to break down complex issues into manageable components.
  • Affinity with financial data (e.g. loans, portfolios, cashflows).
  • A structured and methodical approach to analyzing data and identifying root causes.
  • Ability to communicate insights clearly to both technical and business stakeholders.
  • A proactive mindset with a focus on continuous improvement.
  • Fluent in English, Dutch is a preference.


Please note that for this role you need to be already situated in the Netherlands.


For more information, please contact Ritsa (ritsa.paraskevopoulou@experis.nl).

4432646585,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-google-bigquery-power-bi-at-a2g-consulting-bv-a2g-technologies-4432646585?position=3&pageNum=0&refId=WCtsJAku1XDfauxdtcA31Q%3D%3D&trackingId=GzXk6cCMWl%2F2cqXQwJGc%2Bw%3D%3D,Data Analyst (Google BigQuery/Power BI),A2G Consulting BV (A2G Technologies),"Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands","Contract: 12 months (subject to extension).
Location: Amsterdam, Netherlands.
Salary: Not a constraint for the right candidate!
Experience: 6-8 years.
Hybrid: 2 days Work from Home 3 days Work from Office
Your Profile & DNA:
We're looking for a Data Analyst to join our team and help drive data-informed decision-making across the business.
Roles & Responsibilities
Analyse data to identify trends, patterns, and business insights.
Design, develop, and maintain impactful dashboards and reports using Power BI.
Build and optimise SQL queries for data extraction, transformation, validation, and analysis.
Work with Google BigQuery as our primary enterprise data warehouse.
Apply dimensional modelling and star schema principles to support scalable analytics solutions.
Collaborate with Data Engineers to develop curated datasets using dbt and modern data architecture practices, including Medallion Architecture.
Perform data quality checks, reconciliation, issue investigation, and root cause analysis.
Document datasets, business logic, and reporting processes using Confluence.
Work within Agile teams using Jira, GitHub, and GitHub Flow best practices.
Engage with business and technical stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver effective reporting solutions.
Qualification & Experience
A Bachelor's or Master's Degree or equivalent.
Strong SQL skills
Experience with Power BI dashboard development
Hands-on experience with Google BigQuery or similar cloud data warehouses
Understanding of dimensional modelling, star schemas, and modern data platforms
Working knowledge of dbt and data transformation practices
Experience with GitHub, code reviews, and Agile delivery environments
Strong communication, stakeholder management, and problem-solving skills
What do we offer?
If your profile matches the job requirement and you are interested to be presented to our clients, then please apply and don’t forget to attach your updated CV in line with the JD!
This position is for 1 year with possibility of extension. We offer competitive Gross Salary in line with the market standard.
Besides that, we offer following benefits, such as:
20 days of holiday per year
Encourage Personal Development - Certification (Certification Charges reimbursed)
Income Tax Return Filing
We provide Visa Sponsorship for Candidate & Dependants
Possibility of bonus
Who we are:

A2G Consulting also known as ""A2G Technologies"" is one of the fastest growing staffing companies in North Brabant region, Netherlands. We cater to Asia and Europe market focusing on high tech & non-high-tech clientele
column2: headquartered in Eindhoven, Netherlands with a branch office in India (Bangalore & Pune) & Dubai. We successfully find a candidate and ensure that they get opportunities in line with their aspirations. We offer visa sponsorship for local & international candidates for career-enhancing opportunities. We strongly believe in equal opportunities and hence have a pool of resources with diversified ethnicity.

column1: You will be deployed and work at one of our client sites.

4432576007,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-sia-4432576007?position=4&pageNum=0&refId=WCtsJAku1XDfauxdtcA31Q%3D%3D&trackingId=W4uAruoiDzconx0gYiBlmw%3D%3D,Data Analyst,Sia,"Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands","Sia is a next-generation, global management consulting group. Founded in 1999, we were born digital. Today our strategy and management capabilities are augmented by data science, enhanced by creativity and driven by responsibility. We’re optimists for change and we help clients initiate, navigate and benefit from transformation. We believe optimism is a force multiplier, helping clients to mitigate downside and maximize opportunity.

With expertise across a broad range of sectors and services, our 3,000 consultants serve clients worldwide from 48 locations in 19 countries. Our expertise delivers results. Our optimism transforms outcomes.
Job Description

Want to use data intelligently to deliver maximum value to clients? It's a challenge that suits you perfectly and energizes you. You're looking for challenges where you can not only advise but also deliver tangible results. You want to make a difference. Are you ready for the next phase? Ready to tackle and solve complex data challenges and further specialize in your data management field? Then we'd love to get to know you.
What you'll be doing at the client's site

As a Data Analyst, you'll play a key role with our clients. You'll advise on their data management, develop data strategies, and translate these into workable solutions to maximize the value of their data. You'll be involved in all phases of the project, from developing data governance frameworks to implementing data quality processes and advising on data analysis. Interested in a project like this?
Moreover:
You'll identify improvement opportunities through thorough analyses of data sources and processes.
You'll design and implement data architecture and models for improved interoperability and scalability.
You'll ensure more efficient and effective systems
column2: you'll advise and support data integration, migration, and transformation projects.

column1: You'll provide insights that support your clients in making the right business decisions.
You'll provide training and support to users to help them manage and use data effectively.
Qualifications
This is you

You're naturally curious, enjoy a bit of fun, but are also deadly serious when it comes to the content. Sound familiar? Great, that's what we appreciate in a colleague. Furthermore, in this role, we'd like you to:
Enjoy your work!
Enjoy collaborating with colleagues and clients on interesting issues. In fact, that's a key part of your job.
You want to develop yourself every day with your positive attitude and drive.
You have strong communication skills and, above all, understand the importance of listening. To the client, colleagues, and of course, yourself!
You don't do the same thing every day
column2: you prefer diverse and complex projects.

column1: You do what you promise. You're accurate and ensure your work is completed on time, without compromising on quality.

You're a true team player. As a part of our team, you can always count on support from your colleagues. Achievements are the result of successful collaboration, and we celebrate them together! We value this culture highly. What you bring
What you bring
Completed HBO (higher professional education) or WO (university education) degree
You speak fluent Dutch and English. If you speak German that's a plus!
At least one year of knowledge and experience with (meta)data management and data quality solutions

You possess relevant data and technical skills, such as data cleaning, data visualization, machine learning, knowledge of big data tools, and data warehousing. Knowledge of programming languages ​​is a plus!
You have a strong vision for data management within organizations.
What you can expect from us
Your development is our priority. Whether it’s through challenging projects, inspiring colleagues or personal growth, we invest in your success, every step of the way.
We offer:
An attractive salary that grows with your experience and performance.
A yearly bonus based on your individual and team results.
Sustainable and practical mobility options, whether you prefer to travel by train, bike, or your own vehicle.
A solid pension plan and additional benefits to support your well-being.
Freedom in where you work, from home, at the client’s office, or in one of our inspiring hubs in Amsterdam or Maastricht, including a home working allowance to make remote work comfortable.
26 days of holiday per year, with the opportunity to earn extra days as your seniority grows.
Plenty of learning opportunities, from mentoring and training programs to international projects that broaden your perspective.
A strong community, where connection matters – we organize regular social and sports activities to celebrate successes together.
Do you have the drive and enthusiasm to help build our great company, and does this position sound like a perfect fit for you? We'd love to get to know you!
Additional Information
Unfortunately, we are unable to provide a work permit for this position.

4433098260,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-us3-consulting-4433098260?position=6&pageNum=0&refId=WCtsJAku1XDfauxdtcA31Q%3D%3D&trackingId=UlSSm7GObKq1T7cWctd3wA%3D%3D,Data Analyst,Us3 Consulting,Amsterdam Area,"Data Analyst

We are seeking a skilled Data Analyst to join our growing data and analytics team. You will be responsible for developing high-quality reporting and analytics solutions, transforming data into actionable insights, and working closely with both business and technical stakeholders to support data-driven decision-making.
Key Responsibilities

4432600916,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-data-analyst-at-housinganywhere-4432600916?position=7&pageNum=0&refId=WCtsJAku1XDfauxdtcA31Q%3D%3D&trackingId=pqiQ0GiFvlEpJBgjB%2BTokQ%3D%3D,Senior Data Analyst,HousingAnywhere,"Rotterdam, South Holland, Netherlands","We’re on a mission to become the go-to destination for students across Europe to find a trusted home away from home. We make every step of the rental journey simple and seamless, so students can focus on what really matters: studying, exploring, and growing.
With HousingAnywhere, Kamernet, and Studapart under our roof, we’re Europe’s largest student rental platform.
You’ll find us in Rotterdam, Paris, and Cergy, always guided by our four core values: Ownership, We are enablers, We are changemakers, and We are connectors.
Join us in empowering students unlock their potential through a safe, online, rental experience.
Your role & impact

We are looking for a data-driven professional who's excited to transform business questions into actionable insights that drive decisions. In this role, you’ll collaborate with commercial teams, to influence strategic planning and elevate business performance. You will work alongside talented and driven data peers in a dynamic environment to create real impact in HousingAnywhere's growth.
Role
The purpose of this role is to empower commercial teams with insights and recommendations to grow our marketplace and get the most out of our team:
Collaborate closely with the commercial teams to translate business questions into analyses, synthesise insights and develop recommendations to drive business results.
Define, develop and monitor the key metrics to measure operational performance and business outcomes, and identify drivers for changes in these metrics.
Ensure business questions are addressed in the most effective format (ad-hoc deep-dive, recurring analysis, dashboards, self-serving functional tools).
Empower stakeholders to independently leverage data for business insights via dashboards and self-serving tools, in close collaboration with the Analytics Engineering and Business Intelligence teams.
Develop dashboards and reports that support operational business processes.
Support commercial teams' OKR planning and measurement.
Identify and implement opportunities to enhance existing analytical processes and methodologies.
Your team

Our Commercial Analytics and Business Intelligence team is formed by 4 analysts from diverse backgrounds and experience levels. We collaborate closely with data engineers, analytics engineers, and data scientists to extract insights and drive informed decision-making.
Your profile
Required:
4+ years experience as a Data Analyst, or equivalent role with a strong data/analytics component.
Analytical mindset, combined with good business sense and orientation.
A good communicator who can present insights and recommendations clearly and persuasively to different audiences.
Self-starter with strong project and time management skills.
Proficient in SQL and Google Sheets, and experience with at least one dashboarding tool (Tableau, Looker, PowerBI, etc.).
Preferred
Advanced knowledge of at least one statistical programming language (Python, R, etc.) is a plus.
Previous experience in a high-growth, fast-paced tech company is a big plus.
Experience creating interactive dashboards in Tableau.
What’s in it for you
Depending on experience and qualifications, the salary range is €56.200 – €72.000 gross per year (based on 40 hours, including Holiday Allowance).
Unlimited paid holidays, minimum-based not maximum!
Hybrid working policy with 2 days working from the office.
Flexibility to work remotely for up to 2 months per year!
1,000 EUR personal development budget.
Complete coverage for commuting.
30% ruling application assistance.
Personal equipment, including laptop and ergonomic setup.
Gym membership discount with GoVital or OneFit.
Dutch/English classes budget.
Variable pension scheme.
Diverse international community (46+ nationalities).
Pet-friendly office in Rotterdam city centre.
Fun team-building and after-work drinks every Friday.
What can you expect from our hiring process? Read more here.

4429558702,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-nikon-europe-4429558702?position=8&pageNum=0&refId=WCtsJAku1XDfauxdtcA31Q%3D%3D&trackingId=YKG5GWQK8yyJcUy18FhCIg%3D%3D,Data Analyst,Nikon Europe,"Amstelveen, North Holland, Netherlands","Job Description

Nikon is a world-leading provider of imaging products and services. Its innovative optics technology—from consumer to professional cameras, lenses to system accessories, healthcare optics, and sports optics —is powered by over 100 years of experience. Globally recognised for setting new standards in design and performance, Nikon’s revolutionary series of mirrorless cameras and NIKKOR lenses represent a new dimension of optical performance.

Nikon is committed to leading imaging culture and increasingly embracing the potential of digital solutions and data, which help our customers to master their craft, find the best equipment and inspire and support. Its award-winning equipment empowers photographers and videographers to realise their creative vision at the highest level.
About The Role
We are looking for a talented, insight-driven  Data Analyst  to join our European Digital Marketing team at Nikon Europe B.V.

You will be the go-to expert for delivering high-quality marketing performance insights that drive smarter decisions across channels including email, social media, web, and paid advertising. Your analysis will help us improve customer understanding, optimize campaigns, improve user journeys, and strengthen customer engagement.

This role focuses on customer data,  media and channel performance analysis, clear reporting, and dashboard creation (primarily in Power BI), with practical tagging and measurement governance. You will also play a key role in automation, measurement governance and privacy-compliant data practices.
Main Responsibilities
Insights & Performance Optimization
Deliver and interpret analytical insights that inform and influence key decisionmakers
Translate complex data into clear, compelling stories and actionable recommendations
Analyze campaign and channel performance (email, social, search, paid media, website) to identify trends, opportunities, and risks
Conduct analyses on customer behavior, segmentation opportunities and funnel bottlenecks
Contribute to advanced measurement approaches like attribution and marketing mix modelling
Reporting & Analytics Maturity
Build, maintain, and continuously improve Power BI dashboards to track digital marketing performance and customer insights
Automate routine reporting to increase efficiency and consistency across markets
Drive analytics maturity uplift through improved methodologies and best practices
Produce regular and ad-hoc reports for marketing stakeholders and senior leadership
Measurement & Data Governance
Define measurement plans and reporting frameworks in collaboration with stakeholders
Manage tagging governance and create clear tagging specifications
Ensure privacy- and consent-compliant measurement in line with regulations and internal policies
Support implementation and validation of tracking via tools such as GTM and GA4
Stakeholder & Partner Collaboration
Work closely with marketing teams, Senior Management and the D2C team to translate business needs into analytical solutions
Coordinate with external partners and agencies on reporting and dashboarding initiatives and optimizing Data Studio dashboards
Act as a trusted advisor on data-driven decision-making across the organization
Job Requirements
Required Profile
Bachelor or Master's degree in the field of Business, Marketing, Statistics, Economics, or related field
3-5 years experience as a data analyst or in a related field
Experience finding, cleaning, and transforming data to build reports, dashboards, and/or data assets
Strong experience building and maintaining dashboards in Power BI
Experience defining metrics, measurement plans and reporting frameworks for marketing campaigns
Comfortable working with marketing teams and external agencies to translate business questions into analytic solutions
Experience with Data Studio and managing external dashboarding partners
Expert with digital analytics platforms (e.g., Google Analytics / GA4) and tag management basics (Google Tag Manager)
Experience communicating and advocating with analytical insights to high-level audiences to inform decision-making
Excellent verbal, written and presentation communication skills (fluency in English required, other languages desirable) with people at all levels
Nice to have
SQL skills sufficient to extract and aggregate data for reporting and analysis
Experience with large-scale data environments and advanced analytics methodologies
Familiarity with attribution modelling or marketing mix modelling
Experience in automation of reporting and scalable data solutions
Understanding of privacy, consent management and data governance principles
What We Offer You
A challenging and rewarding role in a globally recognized organization.
A collaborative and inclusive work environment.
The chance to work at Nikon's European headquarters in Amstelveen, a vibrant and inspiring location.
Good secondary employment conditions, including a fully paid pension by the employer .
How To Apply

If you’re ready to take your career to the next level, we would love to hear from you! You can send your CV and short motivation letter to Alex Damen, Recruitment Business Partner. If we think you are a good fit, we will contact you for an introductory interview with our recruitment team.

As a preferred supplier to one of our biggest Financial Clients, I am seeking for a Data Analyst for a position in Amsterdam, Netherlands. As a Data Analyst, you play a key role in improving and safeguarding the quality of customer data. You combine analytical skills with a product mindset and work closely with stakeholders across the bank.
Responsibilities:
Monitor and improve data quality by defining and applying data quality rules and controls
Analyze data issues (e.g. duplicates, missing or incorrect data) and identify root causes across processes and systems
Drive structural improvements by collaborating with upstream and downstream teams
Support consumers of customer data and help them use data effectively
Translate business needs into clear data requirements and user stories
Increase data awareness and promote data quality practices within the bank
Required knowledge and experience
Have strong analytical skills and take decisions based on data and insights
Are proficient in SQL and experienced in working with large datasets
Have hands-on experience with Power BI for building dashboards and visualizing insights
Are familiar with analytical tools such as Python (pandas) and/or Excel for deeper data analysis
Communicate effectively with both technical and business stakeholders
Translate data into clear, actionable insights that drive impact
Take ownership within your domain and proactively drive improvements
Thrive in multidisciplinary, agile teams
Are fluent in Dutch and English (both verbal and written)
Contract: 12 months+
Rates: Excellent
Location: Amsterdam
Interview: 2 stages, 1 technical + 1 assessment
Nick Chinweerapunt
Account Manager

Data Analyst


As a preferred supplier to one of our biggest Financial Clients, I am seeking for a Data Analyst for a position in Amsterdam, Netherlands. As a Data Analyst, you play a key role in improving and safeguarding the quality of customer data. You combine analytical skills with a product mindset and work closely with stakeholders across the bank.


Responsibilities:

  • Monitor and improve data quality by defining and applying data quality rules and controls
  • Analyze data issues (e.g. duplicates, missing or incorrect data) and identify root causes across processes and systems
  • Drive structural improvements by collaborating with upstream and downstream teams
  • Support consumers of customer data and help them use data effectively
  • Translate business needs into clear data requirements and user stories
  • Increase data awareness and promote data quality practices within the bank


Required knowledge and experience

  • Have strong analytical skills and take decisions based on data and insights
  • Are proficient in SQL and experienced in working with large datasets
  • Have hands-on experience with Power BI for building dashboards and visualizing insights
  • Are familiar with analytical tools such as Python (pandas) and/or Excel for deeper data analysis
  • Communicate effectively with both technical and business stakeholders
  • Translate data into clear, actionable insights that drive impact
  • Take ownership within your domain and proactively drive improvements
  • Thrive in multidisciplinary, agile teams
  • Are fluent in Dutch and English (both verbal and written)


Contract: 12 months+

Rates: Excellent

Location: Amsterdam

Interview: 2 stages, 1 technical + 1 assessment

About The Team

A role with a lot of freedom and responsibility.
An inspiring work environment with enthusiastic colleagues.
Room for initiative and personal growth.
A challenging job in a great team within our high-tech, innovative work environment. Includes the freedom for initiative and good ideas.

A comfortable work space in a modern environment, with a focus on flexibility and the right work life balance.
You can usually work where and whenever you want. Within Thales, we aim for a 60/40 balance, where you work from home at least two days a week, when your role allows this.

A good salary, fitting travel allowance, and the ability to personalize your employment conditions: for instance, you can trade PTO for internet costs, our bicycle plan, company fitness and relocation costs.

Dit ga je doen

Als Data Analist werk je aan de basis van onze informatieproducten én draag je bij aan afdelingsbrede datakwaliteit en uniformiteit. Je zorgt ervoor dat de onderzoekers weten wat de kwaliteit van de data is, dat de data juist verrijkt worden en dat de processen gestructureerd en efficiënt zijn.

Je fungeert als brug tussen data engineers, onderzoekers en beleidsmakers en zorgt dat data correct, goed gedocumenteerd en bruikbaar zijn voor beleidsvorming en onderzoek. Je weet informatievragen en regelgeving te vertalen naar heldere definities en bruikbare documentatie. Daarnaast zorg je ervoor dat jouw werk begrijpelijk, auditeerbaar en overdraagbaar is.
Concreet betekent dit dat je:
data analyseert, verrijkt en structureert in nauwe samenwerking met ontwikkelaars en stakeholders
beleidsvragen vertaalt naar heldere datadefinities, documentatie en functionele ontwerpen
beleidsvragen beantwoordt met scherpe analyses en adviezen
meebouwt aan innovatieve data-oplossingen en proof-of-concepts.
Dit krijg je
Arbeidsovereenkomst voor bepaalde tijd
2 jaar
Het salaris is gebaseerd op een werkweek van 36 uur.
Dit bieden we nog meer

Naast het salaris ontvang je een individueel keuzebudget (IKB). Het IKB bestaat uit geld (16,50% van je bruto jaarsalaris) en tijd. Met het IKB maak jij de keuzes die bij jou passen en kun je een deel van je arbeidsvoorwaarden zelf samenstellen. Je kunt er bijvoorbeeld voor kiezen om een deel van je maandinkomen te laten uitbetalen wanneer jij dat wenst. Ook kun je dit budget omzetten in verlof en andersom of besteden aan fiscaalvriendelijke doelen. Zo mag je maximaal € 2.000,00 IKB-budget per jaar gebruiken voor het fiscaalvriendelijk aflossen van je persoonlijke studieschuld bij DUO. De Rijksoverheid hecht sterk aan persoonlijke groei en loopbaanontwikkeling en biedt daarvoor tal van mogelijkheden. Tot de secundaire arbeidsvoorwaarden behoren onder meer verschillende studiefaciliteiten, bedrijfsfitness, volledige vergoeding van je ov-reiskosten woon-werkverkeer. Ook bieden we je de mogelijkheid om de voor jou belangrijke feestdagen te vieren zonder dat je daar een vrije dag voor hoeft op te nemen. Hemelvaartsdag en/of 2e pinksterdag kun je bijvoorbeeld inruilen voor een andere feestdag. Hierover maak je afspraken met je leidinggevende.
Dit vragen wij

Analytisch ben jij zeer sterk en je doet niets liever dan orde scheppen in het productieproces. Dat moet ook wel, want je werkt in een dynamische omgeving waar betrouwbare informatie wordt geproduceerd op het maatschappelijk boeiende terrein van het onderwijs. Hiervoor is kennis en ervaring met de productie en toepassing van metadata een must.

Als data-analist ben je resultaatgericht, pro-actief en kan je goed samenwerken, dit vraagt vaak een flexibele houding. Daarbij heb je oog voor detail en werk je nauwkeurig. Plannen en organiseren is daar ook onderdeel van. Je bent in staat op een duidelijke manier te communiceren (zowel mondeling als schriftelijk) en te adviseren over de data, waardoor je een waardevolle sparringpartner bent voor interne en externe stakeholders.
Daarnaast heb je:
HBO/WO werk- en denkniveau met minimaal een afgeronde HBO/WO opleiding bij voorkeur met een data- of
ICT-component
Aantoonbare ervaring met functionele ontwerpen en kennis van technische ontwerpen, vaardig in het opstellen van
productspecificaties en kan goed de vertaalslag maken tussen de business en databases
Kennis van en ervaring met ETL-processen en bij voorkeur met PowerCenter
Ervaring met werken in een Agile-omgeving
column2: kennis van DataOps en Jira is een pré

column1: Ervaring met SQL
column2: kennis van data-analyse software zoals R of python pandas is een pré

column1: Voor de vacature van Data Analist zoeken wij een professional die primair kan worden ingezet als data analist en,
waar nodig, tevens werkzaamheden als data engineer kan uitvoeren.
Wij zullen daarom specifiek letten op de volgende functie-eisen: ervaring met het ontwikkelen van ETL-pipelines,
data lakes, datawarehouses en datamarts. Kennis van SQL Server en/of Informatica PowerCenter geldt als pré,
evenals ervaring met Agile werken binnen een DataOps-omgeving.
Bij twijfel kan een assessment onderdeel uitmaken van het werving- en selectieproces.
Hier kom je te werken
Meer over DUO/DPD-OI

Naast de bekostiging van onderwijsinstellingen en de uitvoering van studiefinanciering, heeft DUO ook de belangrijke taak om onderwijsgegevens te verrijken en om te zetten naar beleidsinformatie. Toegankelijke, betrouwbare en nauwkeurige data is immers essentieel voor de voorbereiding, uitvoering en evaluatie van succesvol onderwijsbeleid. De afdeling, Informatieproducten (IP) van DUO, is verantwoordelijk voor het verzamelen, analyseren en verstrekken van deze informatie. De afdeling IP bestaat uit ongeveer 90 gedreven data-engineers, analisten, onderzoekers en data scientists, die samen zorgen voor het genereren van waardevolle inzichten. Via open data, interactieve dashboards en onderzoeksrapportages leveren we deze informatie aan het ministerie van Onderwijs, Cultuur en Wetenschap, evenals aan andere maatschappelijke partners die het gebruiken voor onderzoek, advies en beleid.

Daarnaast zetten we onze expertise in data science ook in om de datagedreven dienstverlening binnen de DUO-organisatie verder te ontwikkelen. Door gebruik te maken van moderne technieken dragen we bij aan het optimaliseren van onze interne processen en het verbeteren van onze dienstverlening.

De afdeling is volop in ontwikkeling, wat veel kansen biedt voor de persoonlijke en professionele groei van onze medewerkers. We streven naar verbeterde en versnelde informatieontsluiting, het gebruik van de moderne tools op het gebied van datawarehousing, datavisualisatie en data science, en het uitbreiden van samenwerkingsverbanden. We verwachten van iedereen een bijdrage aan de ontwikkeling van en taken voor de afdeling.
Over Dienst Uitvoering Onderwijs (DUO)

De Dienst Uitvoering Onderwijs (DUO) werkt in opdracht van het ministerie van Onderwijs, Cultuur en Wetenschap en is de schakel tussen iedereen die met onderwijs te maken heeft: studenten, ouders, docenten, scholen, universiteiten, beleidsmakers en overheidsorganisaties. DUO is volop in beweging. Zo houden wij ons meer dan ooit bezig met de vraag hoe wij onze klanten nog sneller, beter en kostenefficiënter 24/7 van dienst kunnen zijn. ICT speelt daarin een belangrijke rol
column2: innovatie en de nieuwste technologieën staan in de ontwikkeling van DUO centraal.

column1: Wil je deel uitmaken van deze vernieuwende en toonaangevende werkgever in Groningen en Den Haag? Natuurlijk weten wij dat onze organisatie alleen succesvol kan zijn als jij als medewerker alle kansen krijgt om te leren en te groeien. Niet voor niets investeren wij in jouw vakinhoudelijke en persoonlijke ontwikkeling met interessante traineeships en opleidingen, en kun je rekenen op een goede balans tussen werk en privé. Zo zetten we gezamenlijk de schouders onder het succes en de groei van de organisatie.
Bijzonderheden
Deze vacature wordt gelijktijdig in- en extern uitgezet.
Rijksmedewerkers hebben voorrang in de sollicitatieprocedure.

Bij de Rijksoverheid beschrijft het Kwaliteitsraamwerk Informatievoorziening (KWIV) eenduidige kwaliteitsprofielen voor alle IV-professionals. KWIV bestaat uit een aantal kwaliteiten (KWIV)-profielen, waarbij per KWIV-profiel specifieke competenties, kennis en trainingen zijn geformuleerd. Elke IV-functie is te koppelen aan één (best passend) KWIV-profiel, dat beschrijft wat de IV-professional zou moeten kunnen en kennen. Het KWIV profiel van deze functie is Business intelligence / data analyse. De inhoud van de functie wijkt niet af van wat er in de vacaturetekst is opgenomen.
Neem voor meer informatie over de inhoud van de functie contact op met Judith Bol (manager) via e-mailadres [email protected].
Neem voor meer informatie over de sollicitatieprocedure contact op met Claire Adams (HR-adviseur) via e-mailadres [email protected].
Interesse in deze functie? Stuur ons dan een motivatiebrief samen met jouw (bij voorkeur) Europass CV (www.europass.eu).
Je kunt reageren t/m 6 juli 2026.

Bij DUO streven we naar diversiteit en een inclusieve werkomgeving. Wij willen onze teams graag verrijken met collega’s van diverse achtergronden en culturen om onze dienstverlening nog meer te kunnen verbeteren. Zo kunnen we samen onze krachten, ervaring en inzichten bundelen en dragen we ons steentje bij aan een slim, vaardig en creatief Nederland.

Deze vacature is geschikt voor doelgroep banenafspraak. Tot de doelgroep banenafspraak behoren de volgende groepen mensen: mensen met een Wajong-uitkering, mensen met een WSW-indicatie, mensen met een WIW of ID-baan, mensen uit de doelgroep van de Participatiewet die niet WML kunnen verdienen. Sta je in het doelgroepregister en ben je benieuwd naar de mogelijkheden bij DUO? Kijk voor meer informatie op Banenafspraak – Werken bij DUO.
Controleer regelmatig je ongewenste/spam e-mailmap. Het kan voorkomen dat mailwisseling vanuit DUO in deze map(pen) terechtkomt.
Ben je een intermediair? Wij werven zelf of met onze vaste partners via het Rijksinkoopstelsel. Acquisitie is niet gewenst.
Over de functiegroep Medewerker Behandelen en Ontwikkelen

Door het Functiegebouw Rijk worden medewerkers en leidinggevenden geholpen bij het maken van resultaat- en ontwikkelafspraken in functioneringsgesprekken en krijgt men inzicht in de loopbaanmogelijkheden binnen de Rijksoverheid.
Meer informatie op Functiegebouw Rijksoverheid

    Analytisch ben jij zeer sterk en je doet niets liever dan orde scheppen in het productieproces. Dat moet ook wel, want je werkt in een dynamische omgeving waar betrouwbare informatie wordt geproduceerd op het maatschappelijk boeiende terrein van het onderwijs. Hiervoor is kennis en ervaring met de productie en toepassing van metadata een must.

    Als data-analist ben je resultaatgericht, pro-actief en kan je goed samenwerken, dit vraagt vaak een flexibele houding. Daarbij heb je oog voor detail en werk je nauwkeurig. Plannen en organiseren is daar ook onderdeel van. Je bent in staat op een duidelijke manier te communiceren (zowel mondeling als schriftelijk) en te adviseren over de data, waardoor je een waardevolle sparringpartner bent voor interne en externe stakeholders.

    Daarnaast heb je:

    • HBO/WO werk- en denkniveau met minimaal een afgeronde HBO/WO opleiding bij voorkeur met een data- of

    ICT-component
column5:
• Aantoonbare ervaring met functionele ontwerpen en kennis van technische ontwerpen, vaardig in het opstellen van

productspecificaties en kan goed de vertaalslag maken tussen de business en databases
column6: • Kennis van en ervaring met ETL-processen en bij voorkeur met PowerCenter
column7: • Ervaring met werken in een Agile-omgeving
column8: kennis van DataOps en Jira is een pré
column9: • Ervaring met SQL
column10: kennis van data-analyse software zoals R of python pandas is een pré
column11:
• Voor de vacature van Data Analist zoeken wij een professional die primair kan worden ingezet als data analist en,

    • waar nodig, tevens werkzaamheden als data engineer kan uitvoeren.

    • Wij zullen daarom specifiek letten op de volgende functie-eisen: ervaring met het ontwikkelen van ETL-pipelines,

    data lakes, datawarehouses en datamarts. Kennis van SQL Server en/of Informatica PowerCenter geldt als pré,

    evenals ervaring met Agile werken binnen een DataOps-omgeving.

    • Bij twijfel kan een assessment onderdeel uitmaken van het werving- en selectieproces.

    Hier kom je te werken

    Meer over DUO/DPD-OI

    Naast de bekostiging van onderwijsinstellingen en de uitvoering van studiefinanciering, heeft DUO ook de belangrijke taak om onderwijsgegevens te verrijken en om te zetten naar beleidsinformatie. Toegankelijke, betrouwbare en nauwkeurige data is immers essentieel voor de voorbereiding, uitvoering en evaluatie van succesvol onderwijsbeleid. De afdeling, Informatieproducten (IP) van DUO, is verantwoordelijk voor het verzamelen, analyseren en verstrekken van deze informatie. De afdeling IP bestaat uit ongeveer 90 gedreven data-engineers, analisten, onderzoekers en data scientists, die samen zorgen voor het genereren van waardevolle inzichten. Via open data, interactieve dashboards en onderzoeksrapportages leveren we deze informatie aan het ministerie van Onderwijs, Cultuur en Wetenschap, evenals aan andere maatschappelijke partners die het gebruiken voor onderzoek, advies en beleid.

    Daarnaast zetten we onze expertise in data science ook in om de datagedreven dienstverlening binnen de DUO-organisatie verder te ontwikkelen. Door gebruik te maken van moderne technieken dragen we bij aan het optimaliseren van onze interne processen en het verbeteren van onze dienstverlening.

    De afdeling is volop in ontwikkeling, wat veel kansen biedt voor de persoonlijke en professionele groei van onze medewerkers. We streven naar verbeterde en versnelde informatieontsluiting, het gebruik van de moderne tools op het gebied van datawarehousing, datavisualisatie en data science, en het uitbreiden van samenwerkingsverbanden. We verwachten van iedereen een bijdrage aan de ontwikkeling van en taken voor de afdeling.

    Over Dienst Uitvoering Onderwijs (DUO)

    De Dienst Uitvoering Onderwijs (DUO) werkt in opdracht van het ministerie van Onderwijs, Cultuur en Wetenschap en is de schakel tussen iedereen die met onderwijs te maken heeft: studenten, ouders, docenten, scholen, universiteiten, beleidsmakers en overheidsorganisaties. DUO is volop in beweging. Zo houden wij ons meer dan ooit bezig met de vraag hoe wij onze klanten nog sneller, beter en kostenefficiënter 24/7 van dienst kunnen zijn. ICT speelt daarin een belangrijke rol
column12:
innovatie en de nieuwste technologieën staan in de ontwikkeling van DUO centraal.

Wil je deel uitmaken van deze vernieuwende en toonaangevende werkgever in Groningen en Den Haag? Natuurlijk weten wij dat onze organisatie alleen succesvol kan zijn als jij als medewerker alle kansen krijgt om te leren en te groeien. Niet voor niets investeren wij in jouw vakinhoudelijke en persoonlijke ontwikkeling met interessante traineeships en opleidingen, en kun je rekenen op een goede balans tussen werk en privé. Zo zetten we gezamenlijk de schouders onder het succes en de groei van de organisatie.

Bijzonderheden

  • Deze vacature wordt gelijktijdig in- en extern uitgezet.
  • Rijksmedewerkers hebben voorrang in de sollicitatieprocedure.
  • Bij de Rijksoverheid beschrijft het Kwaliteitsraamwerk Informatievoorziening (KWIV) eenduidige kwaliteitsprofielen voor alle IV-professionals. KWIV bestaat uit een aantal kwaliteiten (KWIV)-profielen, waarbij per KWIV-profiel specifieke competenties, kennis en trainingen zijn geformuleerd. Elke IV-functie is te koppelen aan één (best passend) KWIV-profiel, dat beschrijft wat de IV-professional zou moeten kunnen en kennen. Het KWIV profiel van deze functie is Business intelligence / data analyse. De inhoud van de functie wijkt niet af van wat er in de vacaturetekst is opgenomen.
  • Neem voor meer informatie over de inhoud van de functie contact op met Judith Bol (manager) via e-mailadres [email protected].
  • Neem voor meer informatie over de sollicitatieprocedure contact op met Claire Adams (HR-adviseur) via e-mailadres [email protected].
  • Interesse in deze functie? Stuur ons dan een motivatiebrief samen met jouw (bij voorkeur) Europass CV (www.europass.eu).
  • Je kunt reageren t/m 6 juli 2026.
  • Bij DUO streven we naar diversiteit en een inclusieve werkomgeving. Wij willen onze teams graag verrijken met collega’s van diverse achtergronden en culturen om onze dienstverlening nog meer te kunnen verbeteren. Zo kunnen we samen onze krachten, ervaring en inzichten bundelen en dragen we ons steentje bij aan een slim, vaardig en creatief Nederland.
  • Deze vacature is geschikt voor doelgroep banenafspraak. Tot de doelgroep banenafspraak behoren de volgende groepen mensen: mensen met een Wajong-uitkering, mensen met een WSW-indicatie, mensen met een WIW of ID-baan, mensen uit de doelgroep van de Participatiewet die niet WML kunnen verdienen. Sta je in het doelgroepregister en ben je benieuwd naar de mogelijkheden bij DUO? Kijk voor meer informatie op Banenafspraak – Werken bij DUO.
  • Controleer regelmatig je ongewenste/spam e-mailmap. Het kan voorkomen dat mailwisseling vanuit DUO in deze map(pen) terechtkomt.
  • Ben je een intermediair? Wij werven zelf of met onze vaste partners via het Rijksinkoopstelsel. Acquisitie is niet gewenst.

Over de functiegroep Medewerker Behandelen en Ontwikkelen

Door het Functiegebouw Rijk worden medewerkers en leidinggevenden geholpen bij het maken van resultaat- en ontwikkelafspraken in functioneringsgesprekken en krijgt men inzicht in de loopbaanmogelijkheden binnen de Rijksoverheid.

Meer informatie op Functiegebouw Rijksoverheid

We bouwen met Just Good People een nextgen data team met leuke mensen met sterke data, AI, human & biz skills. Geen PPT-consultancy, maar datakansen kraken en echt waarde realiseren bij toffe klanten. En veel opleiding.

Wil je maximaal leren door in korte tijd bij meerdere bedrijven in de keuken te kijken? Terwijl wij je helpen ontwikkelen op het snijvlak van data, business en people?
Dan hebben we de uitdaging voor jou.
🟡 Just Good People

Bij JGP hebben we twee simpele regels: We nemen goede mensen aan. En we zorgen goed voor deze mensen. Dat betekent dat we samen optrekken om jou maximaal in je kracht te krijgen op een manier die bij jou past.
🌱 Unieke data filosofie
“As machines get better at being machines, humans have to get better at being more human.”

Deze nieuwe tijd vraagt om een nieuw soort data professional. Bij Just Good People Data helpen we bedrijven versnellen met top notch data professionals met goed ontwikkelde data, business én human skills. En trainen je naar nog hoger niveau. Met aandacht voor:
Volgende levels in Data | AI
“Waarde denken” voor klanten/ gebruikers
Stakeholder management
Communiceren & inspireren
⚡ Wat je gaat doen
Je werkt aan projecten bij mooie bedrijven zoals Bol.com, Defensie, Action, Rabo, NS, AMC, ASML, Essent.
Denk aan:
Het maken van veel impact met data
Stakeholders meenemen in de kracht van data – op een begrijpelijke manier
Verbinden van mensen, processen en tech
Vertalen van data naar heldere inzichten, dashboards en rapportages die helpen bij besluitvorming
Signaleren van trends, kansen en verbeterpunten en stakeholders adviseren op basis van data
Meedenken over slimme oplossingen voor complexe vraagstukken
👩 Wie je bent
Je bent technisch sterk maar ook nieuwsgierig naar de mens achter de vraag
Je vindt het leuk om complexe vraagstukken simpel te maken
Je krijgt energie van verandering en nieuwe omgevingen
Je wilt blijven groeien in data, business én human skills
Je hebt 4+ jaar ervaring als Data Analist
Je hebt een WO-opleiding, bijvoorbeeld in Data Science of Econometrie
Je bent ondernemend en denkt in zowel risico’s als kansen
Je schakelt gemakkelijk tussen strategie, business en data
Je durft vragen te stellen en bestaande werkwijzen uit te dagen
Je bent een echte teamspeler en communicatief sterk
Je spreekt en schrijft vloeiend Nederlands en Engels
🚀 Dit ga je krijgen
Vast dienstverband met goed salaris, bonusregeling en aantrekkelijke voorwaarden
Veel persoonlijke aandacht voor waardegroei, inzetbaarheid en “in je kracht komen“ als data professional. Maar ook data inhoudelijke mentoring.
Opleiding en kruisbestuiving met andere professionals in state of the art AI skills
De kans om in diverse keukens te kijken en veel te leren
Leaseauto of NS-Businesscard (ook privégebruik)
Gezellige borrels, kennissessies en team-events
Collega’s die naast slimme analyses ook goed zijn in slechte grappen
Wij zoeken goede data-mensen, die goede dingen doen. Van die types die je er gewoon heel graag bij wil hebben – net zo goed met mensen als met code!

4423365890,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-the-chain-company-4423365890?position=17&pageNum=0&refId=WCtsJAku1XDfauxdtcA31Q%3D%3D&trackingId=iy8tvcq5pnQJQ87MwXS%2FHQ%3D%3D,Data Analyst,The Chain Company,"Oldenzaal, Overijssel, Netherlands","For ROSEN Europe BV in Oldenzaal, we are looking for two analytical and ambitious Data Analysts with 0–3 years of experience.
Due to the continued growth of our organization and increasing demand for data-driven insights, we currently have two vacancies available within our Data Analytics team.

This is a broad data-driven role within an organization that is rapidly evolving in the areas of data and digitization. You will have the opportunity to help build this further and make a direct impact on how data is utilized within the organization.
Description

In this role, the focus is on analyzing, structuring, and visualizing data, as well as developing dashboards and reports. You will work with data from various systems and translate it into insights used for better decision-making and tangible improvements within the organization. At the same time, you will be involved in improving processes, systems, and ways of working, ensuring that data is effectively applied in practice.

Depending on your experience and profile, the exact role will be tailored within the organization. This could be more corporate-focused (central data, reporting, and strategic analyses) or positioned in one of our Regions responsible for Europe, Central Asia, and Africa.

ROSEN is an international and innovative organization focused on high-end technology and data-driven solutions for industrial applications. Within ROSEN Europe, a culture of quality, innovation, and continuous development is key. The organization is experiencing strong growth and offers ample opportunities for initiative, development, and long-term career progression.
Your tasks
• Conduct data analyses and develop dashboards and reports (Power BI and similar tools)
• Combine, structure, and analyze data from different systems
• Identify trends, patterns, and deviations and translate these into actionable insights and improvements for the organization
• Actively contribute to improving data quality, reporting, and data-driven decision-making
• Support teams and management with clear analyses and practical insights
• Identify and implement improvements in processes and ways of working, including through automation
• Write and optimize policies and documentation, supported by AI tools such as Copilot
• Contribute to various data and business intelligence projects within the organization
What you bring
• Completed Master’s degree in, for example, Mathematics, Business IT, Data Science, or a comparable field
• Strong analytical skills and a high level of abstract thinking
• Experience or strong interest in data analytics and AI tools
• Good knowledge of Excel and Power BI (SQL or similar tools is a plus)
• Affinity with AI tools such as Copilot and modern data practices
• Excellent communication skills and a team-oriented mindset
• Eager to learn, independent, and proactive
• Able to easily switch between analysis, investigation, and practical process improvements
• Living in the Twente region (or willing to commute within 45 minutes) and fluently speaking Dutch

Please note that, due to the composition and balance of the current team, we are specifically looking for candidates who are fluent in Dutch and already have permanent eligibility to work within the European Union. Please note that an orientation year (zoekjaar) permit does not meet this requirement.
If you do not meet these requirements, we kindly ask you not to apply, as your application cannot be considered for this position.
Offer
• A challenging entry-level position with significant responsibility and impact
• Working within an international, innovative, and fast-growing organization
• Plenty of opportunities for personal development and career growth
• Collaboration with experienced professionals in data, engineering, and business
• A competitive salary and attractive secondary benefits
• A professional yet informal working environment with short communication lines
• A role with long-term prospects and international career opportunities
Company profile

ROSEN is an international and innovative organization focused on high-end technology and data-driven solutions for industrial applications. Within ROSEN Europe, a culture of quality, innovation, and continuous development is key. The organization is experiencing strong growth and offers ample opportunities for initiative, development, and long-term career progression.

For ROSEN Europe BV in Oldenzaal, we are looking for two analytical and ambitious Data Analysts with 0–3 years of experience.


Due to the continued growth of our organization and increasing demand for data-driven insights, we currently have two vacancies available within our Data Analytics team.

This is a broad data-driven role within an organization that is rapidly evolving in the areas of data and digitization. You will have the opportunity to help build this further and make a direct impact on how data is utilized within the organization.


Description


In this role, the focus is on analyzing, structuring, and visualizing data, as well as developing dashboards and reports. You will work with data from various systems and translate it into insights used for better decision-making and tangible improvements within the organization. At the same time, you will be involved in improving processes, systems, and ways of working, ensuring that data is effectively applied in practice.

Depending on your experience and profile, the exact role will be tailored within the organization. This could be more corporate-focused (central data, reporting, and strategic analyses) or positioned in one of our Regions responsible for Europe, Central Asia, and Africa.


ROSEN is an international and innovative organization focused on high-end technology and data-driven solutions for industrial applications. Within ROSEN Europe, a culture of quality, innovation, and continuous development is key. The organization is experiencing strong growth and offers ample opportunities for initiative, development, and long-term career progression.


Your tasks


• Conduct data analyses and develop dashboards and reports (Power BI and similar tools)

• Combine, structure, and analyze data from different systems

• Identify trends, patterns, and deviations and translate these into actionable insights and improvements for the organization

• Actively contribute to improving data quality, reporting, and data-driven decision-making

• Support teams and management with clear analyses and practical insights

• Identify and implement improvements in processes and ways of working, including through automation

• Write and optimize policies and documentation, supported by AI tools such as Copilot

• Contribute to various data and business intelligence projects within the organization


What you bring


• Completed Master’s degree in, for example, Mathematics, Business IT, Data Science, or a comparable field

• Strong analytical skills and a high level of abstract thinking

• Experience or strong interest in data analytics and AI tools

• Good knowledge of Excel and Power BI (SQL or similar tools is a plus)

• Affinity with AI tools such as Copilot and modern data practices

• Excellent communication skills and a team-oriented mindset

• Eager to learn, independent, and proactive

• Able to easily switch between analysis, investigation, and practical process improvements

• Living in the Twente region (or willing to commute within 45 minutes) and fluently speaking Dutch


Please note that, due to the composition and balance of the current team, we are specifically looking for candidates who are fluent in Dutch and already have permanent eligibility to work within the European Union. Please note that an orientation year (zoekjaar) permit does not meet this requirement.


If you do not meet these requirements, we kindly ask you not to apply, as your application cannot be considered for this position.


Offer


• A challenging entry-level position with significant responsibility and impact

• Working within an international, innovative, and fast-growing organization

• Plenty of opportunities for personal development and career growth

• Collaboration with experienced professionals in data, engineering, and business

• A competitive salary and attractive secondary benefits

• A professional yet informal working environment with short communication lines

• A role with long-term prospects and international career opportunities


Company profile


ROSEN is an international and innovative organization focused on high-end technology and data-driven solutions for industrial applications. Within ROSEN Europe, a culture of quality, innovation, and continuous development is key. The organization is experiencing strong growth and offers ample opportunities for initiative, development, and long-term career progression.

4432549557,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-bi-developer-at-impulssum-4432549557?position=22&pageNum=0&refId=WCtsJAku1XDfauxdtcA31Q%3D%3D&trackingId=2ppfVuix0o2TKQyAkL5BGA%3D%3D,Data Analyst/ BI Developer,impulssum,"Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands","Job Description: Full-time 3-months Internship (with possibility to get hired thereafter full-time with 1 year contract)
Data Analyst/ BI Developer

We are a boutique consulting company focused on Sales & Pricing improvements for small and medium sized companies. Our core focus lies in sales & pricing. We do this through traditional 3-4 months Consulting projects but also with 6-12+ months AI & automation support engagements.. At impulssum, we aim to create lasting impact through data-driven & customer-centric strategic advice that gets implemented and lived by the organization. We combine a top-tier management consulting approach with a strong focus on pragmatically implementing. We operate on the C-level to set strategic direction and on the ground level to get things done. We have a de-centralized organization and work the majority of our time remote, but meet 1-2 days per week at a client site or at another location to work together in person as a team as well. We are looking for someone to strengthen our team for 3 months as an intern and potentially longer as a full time employee.

We cover a broad range of strategic management services, focusing on Gross Profit improvements through topics such as Sales process optimization, Value-Based Pricing, AI sales Process optimization, etc. For more information about our Services, please visit our homepage under www.impulssum.com.
For more information about the products that you would be working on, please have a look at these two pages on our homepage:
PULSE: https://www.impulssum.com/sales_pulse_sales_activity_advice/
COACH: https://www.impulssum.com/sales_coaching/
We focus on the mid-market, where pragmatic delivery is critical. You will work in an entrepreneurial environment and shape impulssum’s future together with us.

In this role, you'll help us further develop a data-driven, AI-enabled product. Working closely with our Co-Founders (one a Senior Data Architect, the other ex-BCG with a strong commercial background), you'll sit at the intersection of data analysis and data engineering — bridging our back-end data with business logic. You'll build on existing data insights, develop new ones, and create AI-powered insights that deliver real value to our customers. Next to that, we may include you for 20-50% of your week on projects as well (only in case needed).
We look for an intern for 3 months with the possibility to get hired thereafter full time (1-year contract).
Typical duties include:
·      Product development
·        Pull data from CRM systems, billing systems, and other data sources
·        Structure and consolidate this data into a unified dataset
·        Define the key reports and insights we want to extract from the data. Combine these into PowerBI dashboards
·        Build an AI logic on top of the data to create personalized, actionable improvement reports for each salesperson
·        Determine the right way to share this information (app, email, format, presentation, etc.)
·        Understand how our CRM (Salesforce) works and improve how we use it
·        Create sales collaterals from the tool that you helped us build
·      Consulting work
·        Support one or several consulting projects, mainly with data analysis
·        Own the analysis and drive insights generation
·        Break down and structure the customer problem
·        Create conclusions and support on presenting back to the client
·        Contribute to the wider business through business development, knowledge sharing, coaching and other activities
We try to work 1-2 days per week together. We also spend some time on-site with the client for important meetings.
Skills & Experience
·      Strong knowledge of SQL and DAX (a programming language such as Python or M-code are a plus)
·      Expert-level proficiency in Microsoft Power BI
·      Familiarity with Microsoft Fabric and/or Snowflake is a plus
·      Proficiency in MS PowerPoint and Excel is a plus (not required)
·      Drive and motivation to continuously develop new knowledge and skills
·      Strong people and client management skills, including the ability to communicate effectively with clients from diverse backgrounds and with differing viewpoints
·      Interest in commercial topics (prior experience not required)
·      Professional level of English. Dutch & German are a plus
What’s in it for you?
·      You get to join a boutique consulting firm and get to build the business together with us
·      Flexible working (Hybrid working, depending on needs)
·      Internship compensation package of €900 per month (any travel will not be compensated separately unless client related)
·      If we continue after the three months with a full-time 1 year contract: Yearly salary of €40.000 (incl. holiday pay) + bonus based on company performance of up to €5.000
·      Good work-life balance
·      You will learn a lot, both on the structural/methodological consulting side but also on how to effectively & efficiently drive things in the industry
·      You get full exposure & responsibility from day 1
·      Impulssum, being a boutique, allows you to work closely together with highly experienced consultants
·      Join the fun team activities that take place several times a year
Job Metrics:
·      Location: Amsterdam, The Netherlands
·      Contract type: Internship
·      Internship period: 3 months
·      Contract type if hired after internship: 1 year contract
·      Vacation days: 25 days on a yearly basis + 5 days over Christmas/ new years
·      Start date: flexible, but ideally August 2025
·      Deadline CV upload: July 6th 2026, 12:00 CET
Interested? Please apply online at LinkedIn

If you are not proficient in Dutch, please have a look at our other job postings instead!)
Your role in our team

As a Junior Data Analyst Retail, you support client teams with analysis, dashboards, KPI insights and data quality checks. You work with data from retail processes such as sales, customer behavior, inventory, promotions, e-commerce or supply chain and help make insights understandable for business stakeholders. At CGI, you grow by working in projects with experienced data consultants, project managers and technical specialists.
How You Strengthen The Team
Analyze datasets and translate findings into clear insights and visualizations.
Build and maintain dashboards and reports in Power BI, Tableau or comparable tooling.
Perform basic data quality checks and document definitions, assumptions and issues.
Support requirements, user stories, KPI definitions and stakeholder questions.
Work with senior consultants, data engineers, business analysts and client teams.
Contribute to presentations, workshops and analyses for retail and consumer-services clients.
What You Bring
1-2 years of experience, internship or traineeship in data analysis, BI, business analysis or analytics.
Solid foundation in SQL, Excel and at least one BI tool such as Power BI, Tableau or Looker.
Affinity with retail, e-commerce, supply chain, customer analytics or commercial analysis.
Able to explain data outcomes clearly to non-technical stakeholders.
Accurate, eager to learn, communicative and comfortable with client contact.
Professional Dutch and English, or demonstrably quick to develop to that level.
We would also value
Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst Associate (PL-300) or demonstrable Power BI experience.
Microsoft Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900), Azure AI Fundamentals (AI-900) or comparable fundamentals.
Basic Python or R for data cleaning, analysis or automation.
Experience with KPIs such as revenue, margin, conversion, inventory, customer segments or promotion effectiveness.
Experience with Jira, Azure DevOps, Confluence or working in an agile team.
Where will you work?

You will join CGI’s retail team and work on assignments where data, business questions and technology come together. You will have room to learn, while contributing from the start to analyses, dashboards and insights that help clients make better decisions.

A learning environment where you can grow quickly towards data consulting in retail.

Job Description

Want to use data intelligently to deliver maximum value to clients? It's a challenge that suits you perfectly and energizes you. column2: you'll advise and support data integration, migration, and transformation projects.

column1: You'll provide insights that support your clients in making the right business decisions.

This is you

Enjoy your work!
Enjoy collaborating with colleagues and clients on interesting issues. In fact, that's a key part of your job.
You want to develop yourself every day with your positive attitude and drive.

column2: you prefer diverse and complex projects.

4431292881,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analist-vastgoed-at-sor-comfortabel-wonen-4431292881?position=35&pageNum=0&refId=WCtsJAku1XDfauxdtcA31Q%3D%3D&trackingId=ZUDq%2F97fsn9C2ckyTsJOKw%3D%3D,Data Analist Vastgoed,SOR | comfortabel wonen,"Rotterdam, South Holland, Netherlands","Wat ga je doen

Als data analist vastgoed bij SOR ben je verantwoordelijk voor het verzamelen, analyseren en vertalen van vastgoeddata naar concrete inzichten en verbeteracties. Je zorgt ervoor dat data niet alleen beschikbaar is, maar ook daadwerkelijk wordt ingezet om processen, prestaties en dienstverlening slimmer en effectiever in te richten. Je stimuleert de rest van de organisatie om (nog) meer datagedreven te gaan werken.

Je analyseert data over vastgoed, onderhoud, verhuur, exploitatie en bewonersstromen en weet trends, knelpunten en kansen zichtbaar te maken. Daarbij kijk je verder dan alleen rapportages: je denkt actief mee over verbeteringen en neemt initiatief om processen structureel te optimaliseren op basis van jouw analyses.

Daarnaast speel je een belangrijke rol in het verder professionaliseren van datakwaliteit, dashboards en rapportages. Je signaleert verbeterkansen, adviseert over efficiëntere werkwijzen en draagt bij aan het ontwikkelen van nieuwe inzichten die helpen bij strategische keuzes rondom vastgoed en dienstverlening.

Je werkt nauw samen met onze huidige data adviseur, die de basis aan het leggen is voor datagedreven werken binnen onze organisatie. Samen met de collega’s van team vastgoedsturing vorm je een belangrijke samenwerking om te komen tot strategische inzichten. In de lijn rapporteer je aan de directeur SIO.

Hiernaast werk je samen met verschillende afdelingen binnen de organisatie en weet complexe informatie begrijpelijk en toepasbaar te maken voor collega’s en management. Je ondersteunt bij beleidsvorming, levert sturingsinformatie aan en helpt de organisatie om datagedreven te werken.
Wie zoeken wij
Hbo werk- en denkniveau
Je hebt ervaring met het ontsluiten en interpreteren van vastgoeddata
Je bent bedreven in het maken van dashboards en rapportages
Je hebt kennis van wet- en regelgeving op het gebied van corporaties (bv. VABI)
column2: Je bent analytisch sterk en kunt data vertalen naar concrete adviezen en verbeteracties
column3: Je weet anderen te enthousiasmeren en motiveren over jouw adviezen

column1: Je neemt initiatief en bent in staat je eigen werk vorm te geven en prioriteren.
Wat krijg je
Een salaris van €4.338 tot €5.704 bruto p/m o.b.v. een 36-urige werkweek, schaal I CAO Woondiensten
Hybride werken
4% Eindejaarsuitkering
€900,- Opleidingsbudget per jaar
Aantrekkelijke pensioenregeling
8% Vakantiegeld
Vitaliteits- en sportbudget van € 250,- netto per kalenderjaar
Elke dag maak je verschil

En omdat je volop in de uitvoering werkt, zie je dat verschil ook elke dag. Voor mevrouw Çelik die een passende woning vindt. Voor de heer De Jong die hulp krijgt bij een klusje. Voor de bewonerscommissie die een gezellige activiteit organiseert.
Elke dag maak je de fijne omgeving mogelijk die elke oudere verdient. Een omgeving waarin ze elkaar ontmoeten, mee kunnen doen en nog een mooie tijd zelfstandig kunnen wonen.
Dat doe je samen.
Met zo’n ruim 80 collega’s. We kennen elkaar, zoeken elkaar gauw op en werken met korte lijntjes. We vinden onszelf meer gelijkgestemden dan collega's.
Verder kenmerkend voor de SOR-cultuur:
Veel vrijheid in je werk: in overleg bepaal je zelf hoe je je taken uitvoert en of je dat vanuit huis of kantoor doet.
Betrokken collega’s: we helpen elkaar waar dat nodig is en zetten een stapje extra waar het kan.
Een directe, Rotterdamse aanpak: we overleggen veel met elkaar, maar altijd richting concrete acties.

'thuisgevoel', waarbij persoonlijke aandacht en de behoeften van diverse senioren centraal staan. SOR onderscheidt zich door een focus op duurzaamheid, betaalbaarheid en innovatie in haar dienstverlening, inclusief digitale transformatie en toekomstige huisvestingsprojecten. De kernwaarden van SOR - duidelijkheid, persoonlijkheid, ondernemerschap en betrokkenheid - vormen de basis van hun sterke bedrijfscultuur.
Interesse?
Solliciteer dan nu op deze vacature.

4428944004,https://nl.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-analyst-fp-a-data-at-robert-walters-4428944004?position=36&pageNum=0&refId=WCtsJAku1XDfauxdtcA31Q%3D%3D&trackingId=8dRv8q3WqcOhbUo%2B2gL%2B%2BA%3D%3D,Senior Analyst - FP&A & Data,Robert Walters,"Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands","Our client is a leading international technology organisation operating across multiple European markets. They are looking for a Senior Analyst FP&A & Analytics to join their Group Finance team in Amsterdam.

This position sits at the intersection of finance, analytics and data, offering an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys combining financial modelling with modern data tools to drive business insights and improve decision-making across an international organisation.
Description
Responsibilities
Develop, maintain and improve financial models to support forecasting, budgeting and strategic planning.
Analyse large financial and operational datasets using SQL, Python and other analytical tools.
Drive automation initiatives to improve reporting efficiency and reduce manual processes.
Own and maintain KPI datasets, ensuring data accuracy, consistency and governance across multiple business units.
Improve existing data structures, reporting processes and analytics capabilities.
Support scenario modelling, ad hoc financial analysis and business performance reviews.
Prepare management reports, presentations and board-level performance materials.
Partner with finance, data and business stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable analytical solutions.
Identify opportunities to improve reporting, automation and financial planning processes.
About You
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Finance, Economics, Engineering, Data Analytics, Mathematics or another quantitative discipline.
Approximately 5+ years of experience within FP&A, Financial Analysis, Business Analytics or a similar analytical role.
Strong financial modelling skills using Excel or Google Sheets.
Experience working with SQL and Python.
Experience with Power Query, Databricks or comparable data transformation tools is highly desirable.
Experience with Tableau, Looker or similar BI tools is considered an advantage.
Comfortable working with large datasets and translating complex information into actionable business insights.
Strong analytical, communication and stakeholder management skills.
Proactive, structured and able to work independently within an international environment.
What's on Offer
Salary up to €85,000 gross per year, depending on experience.

Our client is a leading international technology organisation operating across multiple European markets. They are looking for a Senior Analyst FP&
column2: A &amp
column3:
Analytics to join their Group Finance team in Amsterdam.

This position sits at the intersection of finance, analytics and data, offering an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys combining financial modelling with modern data tools to drive business insights and improve decision-making across an international organisation.

Description

Responsibilities

  • Develop, maintain and improve financial models to support forecasting, budgeting and strategic planning.
  • Analyse large financial and operational datasets using SQL, Python and other analytical tools.
  • Drive automation initiatives to improve reporting efficiency and reduce manual processes.
  • Own and maintain KPI datasets, ensuring data accuracy, consistency and governance across multiple business units.
  • Improve existing data structures, reporting processes and analytics capabilities.
  • Support scenario modelling, ad hoc financial analysis and business performance reviews.
  • Prepare management reports, presentations and board-level performance materials.
  • Partner with finance, data and business stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable analytical solutions.
  • Identify opportunities to improve reporting, automation and financial planning processes.

About You

  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Finance, Economics, Engineering, Data Analytics, Mathematics or another quantitative discipline.
  • Approximately 5+ years of experience within FP&
column4:
A, Financial Analysis, Business Analytics or a similar analytical role.
  • Strong financial modelling skills using Excel or Google Sheets.
  • Experience working with SQL and Python.
  • Experience with Power Query, Databricks or comparable data transformation tools is highly desirable.
  • Experience with Tableau, Looker or similar BI tools is considered an advantage.
  • Comfortable working with large datasets and translating complex information into actionable business insights.
  • Strong analytical, communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Proactive, structured and able to work independently within an international environment.

    • What's on Offer

    • Salary up to €85,000 gross per year, depending on experience.
    • Performance-based annual bonus.
    • 25+ vacation days.
    • Hybrid working model (2-3 days per week in the office).
    • Travel allowance.
    • Competitive pension scheme.
    • Excellent learning and development opportunities.
    • Opportunity to join a highly international organisation undergoing continuous growth and innovation.
    • Broad exposure to Group Finance, analytics and senior business stakeholders.

Een afgeronde HBO-opleiding, bij voorkeur in Finance, Bedrijfskunde of Data Analytics
Affiniteit met financiële data en rapportages
Ervaring met of sterke interesse in Power BI
Een analytische, gestructureerde en nauwkeurige werkwijze
Interesse in procesverbetering en automation
Een proactieve mindset: je denkt graag mee over hoe dingen slimmer en efficiënter kunnen
Goede communicatieve vaardigheden in zowel Nederlands als Engels

Veel ruimte om mee te bouwen aan een datagedreven Finance afdeling
Mogelijkheden om jezelf verder te ontwikkelen in Power BI, data-analyse en reporting
Samenwerken met betrokken collega’s in een professionele en informele werkomgeving
Flexibiliteit en ruimte voor eigen initiatief
