  • Present data findings and recommendations to clients and stakeholders using your knowledge of databases, scripting languages such as SQL, Python, or R, visualization tools, and Microsoft Office Suite.
  • Apply data visualization through formats such as dashboards, graphs, tables, trackers, maps, and PowerPoint slides.
  • Grow your communication and technical skills by creating data-centric solutions across special operations, campaign assessment, partner nation engagement, and operational planning missions.


Work with us to drive large-scale decisions through data insights.

Join us. The world can’t wait.

You Have:

  • 5+ years of experience supporting data visualization, data analysis, data integration, business intelligence, dashboard development, or knowledge management
  • Experience collecting, cleaning, structuring, integrating, analyzing, or visualizing data from multiple sources
  • Experience developing dashboards, visual reports, data trackers, executive-level data products, or recurring reporting tools
  • Knowledge of data visualization principles, data quality, workflow automation, data management, information management, or knowledge management practices
  • Ability to communicate technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders and translate mission requirements into practical data solutions
  • Ability to work with planners, analysts, and operational stakeholders to define data requirements and translate complex information into clear visual products
  • Ability to develop repeatable templates, dashboards, trackers, data collection frameworks, or automated workflows that support recurring reporting and assessment cycles
  • TS/SCI clearance
  • HS diploma or GED


Nice If You Have:

  • Experience supporting a Theater Special Operations Command, Geographic Combatant Command, or other Department of Defense client
  • Experience with security cooperation, partner force development, irregular warfare, counterterrorism, special operations, exercises, or campaign assessment
  • Experience with Microsoft Power Platform, including Power BI, Power Automate, Power Apps, or SharePoint lists
  • Experience with SQL, Python, R, JavaScript, Databricks, application programming interfaces, or data transformation tools
  • Experience supporting Mission Command System – Common Operational Picture, Maven Smart System, Palantir, Advana, Tableau, ESRI, or other mission data platforms
  • Knowledge of Africa regional security dynamics, partner nation operational environments, transnational threat networks, or campaign planning processes
  • Bachelor's degree in Data Analytics, Information Systems, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, Operations Research, Business Analytics, National Security Studies, or a related field preferred
column4:
Master’s degree in Data Analytics, Information Systems, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, Operations Research, Business Analytics, National Security Studies, or a related field a plus


Clearance:

Applicants selected will be subject to a security investigation and may need to meet eligibility requirements for access to classified information
column5:
TS/SCI clearance is required.

Compensation

At Booz Allen, we celebrate your contributions, provide you with opportunities and choices, and support your total well-being. Our offerings include health, life, disability, financial, and retirement benefits, as well as paid leave, professional development, tuition assistance, work-life programs, and dependent care. Our recognition awards program acknowledges employees for exceptional performance and superior demonstration of our values. Full-time and part-time employees working at least 20 hours a week on a regular basis are eligible to participate in Booz Allen’s benefit programs. Individuals that do not meet the threshold are only eligible for select offerings, not inclusive of health benefits. We encourage you to learn more about our total benefits by visiting the Resource page on our Careers site and reviewing Our Employee Benefits page.

Salary at Booz Allen is determined by various factors, including but not limited to location, the individual’s particular combination of education, knowledge, skills, competencies, and experience, as well as contract-specific affordability and organizational requirements. The projected compensation range for this position is $77,500.00 to $176,000.00 (annualized USD). The estimate displayed represents the typical salary range for this position and is just one component of Booz Allen’s total compensation package for employees. This posting will close within 90 days from the Posting Date.

Identity Statement

As part of the hiring process, we will ask you to complete an identity verification process that leverages advanced biometrics and artificial intelligence to ensure authenticity and protect against identity fraud. You are expected to be on camera during interviews and assessments. We reserve the right to take your picture to verify your identity and prevent fraud.

Candidate AI Usage Policy

AI is a part of our daily work at Booz Allen, and we are committed to the responsible and ethical use of AI tools. However, we want to ensure a fair candidate process based on your own skills and knowledge. As part of this commitment, the use of artificial intelligence (AI) or other tools to assist with responses during interviews (whether in-person or virtual) is prohibited unless permission is explicitly provided.

Work Model

Our people-first culture prioritizes the benefits of collaboration, whether it occurs in person or virtually. To support engagement and effective communication, employees working virtually are generally expected to have their cameras on during meetings.

  • Remote: If this position is listed as remote, there may still be occasions when you are required to work in person at a Booz Allen or customer facility.
  • Hybrid: If this position is listed as hybrid, you will be expected to work from a Booz Allen facility frequently, in alignment with leadership expectations and the needs of the role. You may also be required to work from or visit a customer facility.
  • Onsite: If this position is listed as onsite, work will primarily be performed at a Booz Allen office or customer facility, where employees will collaborate directly with colleagues and customers as required by the role.


Commitment to Non-Discrimination

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to disability, status as a protected veteran or any other status protected by applicable federal, state, local, or international law.

Our focus is on end-users that range from professionals in the industrial, construction and infrastructure sectors to DIYers in home improvement, repair, and maintenance. TTI’s powerful brand portfolio includes MILWAUKEE®, RYOBI®, AEG® - recognized worldwide for their deep heritage and innovative product platforms of superior quality.

The company maintains a global manufacturing and product development footprint, with record world-wide sales of approximately US$15.2 billion and around 50,000 employees in 2026. Hiring exceptional people is a top focus at TTI. This drives a high-performance culture across all levels of our organization and helps to achieve our vision of being number one in the industries we serve. Our unique high-speed decision-making process supports our acute focus on developing superior products and meeting high customer expectations. We view our winning culture as a competitive advantage that powers our growth.
Key Responsibilities:
Collaborate with business stakeholders and leadership to gather requirements, develop, and support data modelling and BI solutions for organizational stakeholders
Integrate different data sources into a cohesive data fabric, ensuring data consistency, accuracy and reliability
Conduct business analysis activities to understand business user requirements and translate data and information flows within business processes
Analyze sustainability, quality & regulatory data to identify trends, patterns and areas for improvement
Provide insights and recommendations based on data analysis to support informed decision-making in sustainability initiatives
Perform data profiling, validation and cleaning to ensure accuracy, completeness, and quality of enterprise data
Maintain data quality standards and enforce data governance policies, standards and best practices
Maintain clear documentation for data orchestrations, highlighting their value and contribution to improved data modeling and governance
Requirements:
Bachelor's or similar degree in Data Science, Environmental Science, Sustainability Management, or a related field, or equivalent professional experience
Proven experience with Power BI, Power Automate, VBA, C++ programming, Python, and SAP QuickViewer
Good communication skills in German and English, both written and spoken
Knowledge of Qlik Sense and IBM Envizi is considered an advantage
Relevant experience in data analysis, reporting, and data visualization
#TTI-EMEA

At TTI, we are committed to being an equal opportunity employer. We believe in creating a supportive environment where everyone can thrive and grow. If you're looking to join a forward-thinking company that values collaboration, innovation, and impact — we’d love to hear from you. Apply now and be part of something exciting!
Visit https://www.ttigroup.com to find out more about us

4401635983,https://de.linkedin.com/jobs/view/sr-data-analyst-content-manager-at-bae-systems-inc-4401635983?position=8&pageNum=0&refId=EhdlkcRNFQt6eiPGOyMyUg%3D%3D&trackingId=Jngk8uUC68vY9yRKcRmSPw%3D%3D,Sr Data Analyst/Content Manager,"BAE Systems, Inc.",Stuttgart Region,"
Job Description

BAE Systems is looking for an experienced Senior Data Analyst/Regional Content Manager excited to provide vital analysis in support of the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency mission. The ideal candidate will perform Regional Content Management (RCM) and support to Combatant Commands and NGA Support Teams with dissemination of Source Foundation in Maps, Charts & Geodesy, commercial GEOINT, and commercial data. The candidate shall provide data and content analysis services as described below.
Required Education, Experience, & Skills
12+ years of experience with performing Regional Content Management (RCM) support to:
Provide customer support with dissemination of Source Foundation GEOINT consisting of Maps, Charts & Geodesy, commercial GEOINT, and commercial data.
Provide on-site and virtual instructions to mission partners on how to use online commercial GEOINT, and commercial data dissemination services.

Advise customers on various methods for data delivery to include the use of digital or electronic transfer i.e., Enterprise File Delivery (EFD) System, and use of media (CDs, DVDs, Blue-Ray discs, hard drives, NAS units, etc.) and online self-service tools. Assess and document assigned content profile and associated workflows and storage and dissemination architecture. Provide recommendations on opportunities to improve the Combatant Command’s profile.

Provide data dissemination support to include hard-drives, EFD, and other dissemination methods to support mission partner capabilities to receive, store and organize GEOINT data on local file servers.
Serve as a Data Transfer Officer transferring data between networked computer systems and approved removable media.
Perform management, data manipulation and analysis to assess integrity, identify patterns, and determine and correct shortfalls
Develop and document data management and dissemination workflows, and transfer data between multiple formats, and provide advanced data visualization.
Develop and apply methods to identify, collect, process, and analyze large volumes of data to build and enhance GEONT processes, and systems.

Work with ESRI Portal technology to develop and maintain map services, source governance documents including but not limited to Strategic Implementation Plan, Concept of Operations (CONOPS), Communications Plan, and customer strategy.
Preferred Education, Experience, & Skills
Bachelor's Degree and 12+ years work experience or equivalent experience
Pay Information
Full-Time Salary Range: $107359 - $182510

Please note: This range is based on our market pay structures. However, individual salaries are determined by a variety of factors including, but not limited to: business considerations, local market conditions, and internal equity, as well as candidate qualifications, such as skills, education, and experience.

Employee Benefits: At BAE Systems, we support our employees in all aspects of their life, including their health and financial well-being. Regular employees scheduled to work 20+ hours per week are offered: health, dental, and vision insurance
column2: health savings accounts
column3: a 401(k) savings plan
column4: disability coverage
column5: and life and accident insurance. We also have an employee assistance program, a legal plan, and other perks including discounts on things like home, auto, and pet insurance. Our leave programs include paid time off, paid holidays, as well as other types of leave, including paid parental, military, bereavement, and any applicable federal and state sick leave. Employees may participate in the company recognition program to receive monetary or non-monetary recognition awards. Other incentives may be available based on position level and/or job specifics.

column1: About BAE Systems Intelligence & Security

BAE Systems, Inc. is the U.S. subsidiary of BAE Systems plc, an international defense, aerospace and security company which delivers a full range of products and services for air, land and naval forces, as well as advanced electronics, security, information technology solutions and customer support services. Improving the future and protecting lives is an ambitious mission, but it’s what we do at BAE Systems. Working here means using your passion and ingenuity where it counts – defending national security with breakthrough technology, superior products, and intelligence solutions. As you develop the latest technology and defend national security, you will continually hone your skills on a team—making a big impact on a global scale. At BAE Systems, you’ll find a rewarding career that truly makes a difference.

Intelligence & Security (I&S), based in McLean, Virginia, designs and delivers advanced defense, intelligence, and security solutions that support the important missions of our customers. Our pride and dedication shows in everything we do—from intelligence analysis, cyber operations and IT expertise to systems development, systems integration, and operations and maintenance services. Knowing that our work enables the U.S. military and government to recognize, manage and defeat threats inspires us to push ourselves and our technologies to new levels.
This position will be posted for at least 5 calendar days. The posting will remain active until the position is filled, or a qualified pool of candidates is identified.

4432101022,https://de.linkedin.com/jobs/view/referent-data-analytics-m-w-d-at-lbbw-4432101022?position=9&pageNum=0&refId=EhdlkcRNFQt6eiPGOyMyUg%3D%3D&trackingId=F1PnhcLXTu0ducanKjibeQ%3D%3D,Referent Data Analytics (m/w/d),LBBW,"Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germany","Referenznummer: 17530 - Einsatzort: Stuttgart - Unternehmen: BW Bank - Funktionsbereich: Zentralbereich PKS - Vollzeit / Teilzeit: 100

Die LBBW zählt zu den führenden Banken Deutschlands und ist ein innovatives Unternehmen im Finanzsektor. Neben traditionellen Bankdienstleistungen beschäftigen wir uns mit den Bereichen Digitalisierung, Nachhaltigkeit und internationale Märkte. Wir bieten ein Umfeld, das persönliche und berufliche Entwicklung fördert. Mit über 10.000 Mitarbeitenden gestalten wir die Zukunft der Finanzwelt – Gemeinsam #NeuesSchaffen

Im Rahmen der konsequenten Ausrichtung des Kundengeschäfts der BW-Bank hin zu einer Omnikanalbank kommt dem Ausbau und der Weiterentwicklung von Data Analytics und künstlicher Intelligenz eine herausragende Bedeutung zu.
Als Referent*in Data Analytics (m/w/d) schürfst Du mit uns nach den Rohstoffen für unseren Erfolg. In der Vielfalt verfügbarer Daten wirst Du finden, wonach wir suchen: Informationen und Wissen.

Wage mit uns den Blick in die Zukunft, auf der Grundlage unserer Daten und der Smart-Data Analytics Plattform. Es inspiriert Dich, Rohdaten in analysierbare Strukturen zu überführen, damit daraus wertvolle Erkenntnisse gewonnen werden können. Immer mit direktem Bezug zur gelebten Praxis. Du wirst bei uns aus Daten Werte schaffen.

Wir bauen auf kurze Berichtswege, Gestaltungsspielraum und Teamwork. Du triffst auf ein hochmotiviertes, offenes und integratives Team. Wenn Du Freude am Gestalten und Entwickeln hast und unsere BW-Bank gemeinsam mit uns nach vorne bringen möchtest, dann freuen wir uns auf Dich und auf Deine Bewerbung.
Aufgaben:
Verantwortung für die Datenanbindung und -bereitstellung für KI und Data Analytics sowie Sicherstellung von Struktur, Effizienz, Stabilität und Performance im Datenhaushalt der S-DAP
Sicherstellung des stabilen produktiven Betriebs der Datenversorgung durch Monitoring, Fehleranalyse und Ablaufautomatisierung
Entwicklung und Betrieb robuster sowie skalierbarer Datenlade- und Transformationsprozesse auf der S-DAP für unterschiedliche Abnehmer
Überführung fachlicher Datenanforderungen in eine strukturierte Datenbereitstellung unter konsequenter Berücksichtigung des „Need-to-know“-Prinzips
Mitwirkung im S-DAP Releasemanagement sowie an der kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung der Datenversorgung
Profil:
Abgeschlossenes Studium der Informatik oder Wirtschaftsinformatik mit Programmierkenntnisse in Scala (Spark), PySpark und Python
Sehr gute SQL-Kenntnisse und sicherer Umgang mit Datenbankabfragen und -optimierung
Fundierte Datenbankgrundlagen im Bezug auf Relationale Datenbanken sowie Nicht-relationale Datenbanken (z. B. NoSQL-Technologien)
Praxiserfahrung im Umgang mit Parquet und idealerweise weiteren Big-Data-Formaten
Sehr gute ETL-Kenntnisse und Erfahrung im Aufbau robuster Datenlade- und Transformationsprozesse
Erfahrung mit Kubernetes und Container-Technologien
Umgang mit der Linux-Shell (Scripting)
Kenntnisse in Deployment- und Development-Prozessen: Git und Branching-Strategien sowie CI/CD-Pipelines (Toolchain)
Erfahrung mit einem Job-Steuerung-Tool, idealerweise Control-M
Ausgeprägte Freude am Arbeiten mit Daten und an komplexen Datenflüssen
Bereitschaft, sowohl in der Entwicklung als auch im Betrieb Verantwortung zu übernehmen
Bankfachliches Know-how oder hohe Bereitschaft, sich in bankfachliche Themen einzuarbeiten
Analytische und strukturierte Arbeitsweise, Teamfähigkeit und Kommunikationsstärke, Bereitschaft Wissen zu teilen

Referenznummer: 17530 - Einsatzort: Stuttgart - Unternehmen: BW Bank - Funktionsbereich: Zentralbereich PKS - Vollzeit / Teilzeit: 100

Die LBBW zählt zu den führenden Banken Deutschlands und ist ein innovatives Unternehmen im Finanzsektor. Neben traditionellen Bankdienstleistungen beschäftigen wir uns mit den Bereichen Digitalisierung, Nachhaltigkeit und internationale Märkte. Wir bieten ein Umfeld, das persönliche und berufliche Entwicklung fördert. Mit über 10.000 Mitarbeitenden gestalten wir die Zukunft der Finanzwelt – Gemeinsam #NeuesSchaffen

Im Rahmen der konsequenten Ausrichtung des Kundengeschäfts der BW-Bank hin zu einer Omnikanalbank kommt dem Ausbau und der Weiterentwicklung von Data Analytics und künstlicher Intelligenz eine herausragende Bedeutung zu.

Als Referent*in Data Analytics (m/w/d) schürfst Du mit uns nach den Rohstoffen für unseren Erfolg. In der Vielfalt verfügbarer Daten wirst Du finden, wonach wir suchen: Informationen und Wissen.

Wage mit uns den Blick in die Zukunft, auf der Grundlage unserer Daten und der Smart-Data Analytics Plattform. Es inspiriert Dich, Rohdaten in analysierbare Strukturen zu überführen, damit daraus wertvolle Erkenntnisse gewonnen werden können. Immer mit direktem Bezug zur gelebten Praxis. Du wirst bei uns aus Daten Werte schaffen.

Wir bauen auf kurze Berichtswege, Gestaltungsspielraum und Teamwork. Du triffst auf ein hochmotiviertes, offenes und integratives Team. Wenn Du Freude am Gestalten und Entwickeln hast und unsere BW-Bank gemeinsam mit uns nach vorne bringen möchtest, dann freuen wir uns auf Dich und auf Deine Bewerbung.

Aufgaben:

  • Verantwortung für die Datenanbindung und -bereitstellung für KI und Data Analytics sowie Sicherstellung von Struktur, Effizienz, Stabilität und Performance im Datenhaushalt der S-DAP
  • Sicherstellung des stabilen produktiven Betriebs der Datenversorgung durch Monitoring, Fehleranalyse und Ablaufautomatisierung
  • Entwicklung und Betrieb robuster sowie skalierbarer Datenlade- und Transformationsprozesse auf der S-DAP für unterschiedliche Abnehmer
  • Überführung fachlicher Datenanforderungen in eine strukturierte Datenbereitstellung unter konsequenter Berücksichtigung des „Need-to-know“-Prinzips
  • Mitwirkung im S-DAP Releasemanagement sowie an der kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung der Datenversorgung

Profil:

  • Abgeschlossenes Studium der Informatik oder Wirtschaftsinformatik mit Programmierkenntnisse in Scala (Spark), PySpark und Python
  • Sehr gute SQL-Kenntnisse und sicherer Umgang mit Datenbankabfragen und -optimierung
  • Fundierte Datenbankgrundlagen im Bezug auf Relationale Datenbanken sowie Nicht-relationale Datenbanken (z. B. NoSQL-Technologien)
  • Praxiserfahrung im Umgang mit Parquet und idealerweise weiteren Big-Data-Formaten
  • Sehr gute ETL-Kenntnisse und Erfahrung im Aufbau robuster Datenlade- und Transformationsprozesse
  • Erfahrung mit Kubernetes und Container-Technologien
  • Umgang mit der Linux-Shell (Scripting)
  • Kenntnisse in Deployment- und Development-Prozessen: Git und Branching-Strategien sowie CI/CD-Pipelines (Toolchain)
  • Erfahrung mit einem Job-Steuerung-Tool, idealerweise Control-M
  • Ausgeprägte Freude am Arbeiten mit Daten und an komplexen Datenflüssen
  • Bereitschaft, sowohl in der Entwicklung als auch im Betrieb Verantwortung zu übernehmen
  • Bankfachliches Know-how oder hohe Bereitschaft, sich in bankfachliche Themen einzuarbeiten
  • Analytische und strukturierte Arbeitsweise, Teamfähigkeit und Kommunikationsstärke, Bereitschaft Wissen zu teilen

4431208410,https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-team-intelligence-at-voyado-4431208410?position=1&pageNum=0&refId=bBbp%2F0yjGF0gJj54H4JmRw%3D%3D&trackingId=kqsx28Lw0mj3KZym05bXFA%3D%3D,Data Analyst - Team Intelligence,Voyado,"Stockholm, Stockholm County, Sweden","At Voyado, hundreds of retailers rely on dashboards, exports and shared analytics experiences to understand their business and make decisions. Behind every metric, dashboard and export sits a series of product decisions: what should be measured, how it should be defined, and how it should work consistently across customers, markets and products.
We’re now looking for Data Analysts to join Team Intelligence in Stockholm and help shape the analytics products our customers will rely on for years to come.
About The Role

As a Data Analyst in Team Intelligence, you will work with analytics products that scale across Voyado’s product portfolio. You will help harmonise how data, KPIs and analytics surfaces work across products such as dashboards, BI Export and DeltaShare.
Your focus will be on building analytics experiences that are accurate, consistent and useful for many customers — not creating one-off reports for individual stakeholders.

You’ll work closely with Product Managers, Analytics Engineers and domain teams to understand customer needs, investigate data discrepancies, define shared metrics and contribute to the broader product roadmap for analytics across Voyado.
Who you are

You have a product mindset and see dashboards, metrics and analytics experiences as products that need ownership and continuous improvement. You’re comfortable working closely with Product Managers, engineers and other stakeholders, and you enjoy creating clarity where definitions, data or expectations differ.
You’re curious, analytical and enjoy understanding how data works beneath the surface. When numbers don’t add up, you want to find out why.
Most importantly, you care about building analytics that people can trust. We'd love to see that you also have:
Experience working as a Data Analyst, BI Analyst or in a similar analytics-focused role.
Strong SQL skills.
Experience with BI tools such as Sigma, Looker, Tableau, Power BI or similar.
Experience owning dashboards, reports or data products over time.
Ability to translate business and customer questions into clear data requirements.
Strong communication skills and experience working with multiple stakeholders.
High Impact. Great People. Real Growth.
You’ll join a company with strong momentum, modern technology, and a collaborative culture where ideas and initiatives are encouraged.

At Voyado, we care about creating an environment where people can grow, collaborate, and enjoy the journey together. We move quickly, challenge ideas, and work closely across teams to deliver meaningful impact.
Some of our benefits:
30 days of vacation
Wellness allowance
Personal development opportunities
Summits and team activities
Four days from the office and one day from home
About Voyado
Voyado is the Agentic Customer Experience Suite for retail.

More than 500 retail brands across 100 markets use Voyado to unite CRM, loyalty, product discovery, e-commerce personalization, and retail media with retail-trained AI that acts on real-time shopper intent.

By combining customer data with product intelligence, Voyado helps retailers deliver more relevant experiences across every channel — online and in-store. The result is more traffic, higher conversions, stronger customer relationships, and measurable business impact.
We’re growing across Europe and are looking for people who want to help shape the future of retail technology.
Ready to make an impact?
Fantastic! 🎉
A quick note about our recruitment timeline: As many of us will be taking some well-deserved summer vacation, this process will move a bit slower than usual.

We’d still love to hear from you as soon as possible! We’ll be holding initial screening conversations before July 13, after which we’ll take a short summer break. First-round interviews will begin from July 27 onwards.
Thank you for your understanding, and we hope you’ll apply! 🌞
Additional information
As part of our recruitment process, we conduct a background check on the final candidate.
Making it personal with AI

We believe you’ll position yourself best for success in the interview process by being yourself, with support from AI where it makes sense. Later in the process, you may even be expected to use AI. At the end of the day, what matters is meeting you — the person behind the application.
There is no such thing as a perfect candidate
column2: we’re all human, so please bring your authentic self. Don’t let AI over-polish your CV or answers to the point where we can’t hear your real voice, because that’s what we care about most.

By combining customer data with product intelligence, we empower retailers to deliver the right message, product, or offer at exactly the right time. The result? Stronger customer relationships and measurable business impact.

4430715509,https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-saab-4430715509?position=2&pageNum=0&refId=bBbp%2F0yjGF0gJj54H4JmRw%3D%3D&trackingId=Xf7G9%2FanZb3o2s14ggkCfQ%3D%3D,Data Analyst,Saab,"Solna, Stockholm County, Sweden","Want to influence the bigger picture? At Saab, you can realise amazing innovations that keep people and societies safe. Together, we can truly make an impact – and your part matters.
Your role

Operational Development within Procurement, SAAB Surveillance, is in a strong transformation phase where data, analytics, and digital tools are key enablers to improve efficiency, quality, and performance across procurement operations. We are now looking for a Data Analyst, who will be part of the Operational Development team supporting Procurement in Surveillance.

In this role, you will work closely with procurement operations, strategic buyers, and operational procurement teams, as well as cross-functional stakeholders, to transform data into actionable insights that drive operational improvements, process efficiency, and better decision-making. You will collect, structure, analyze, and interpret data from ERP and procurement-related systems to identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, trends, and improvement opportunities across procurement processes, supplier interactions, and operational workflows. You will also develop and maintain analytical solutions using SQL and BI tools such as QlikSense or similar platforms, enabling transparency and supporting fact-based decision-making. The role combines hands-on analytics with strong collaboration in a highly operational environment. You will be part of a team where collaboration, curiosity, and delivery focus are central. We value openness, continuous learning, and a strong delivery mindset, where everyone contributes to driving real operational change.
This position can be based in Solna or Gothenburg.
Main responsibilities:
Drive data-driven operational improvement initiatives within Procurement Operations, SAAB Surveillance
Analyze operational procurement data to identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, trends, and improvement opportunities
Work closely with procurement operations teams to understand processes, performance, and daily challenges
Support operational development initiatives through data analysis and insight generation
Build dashboards and reporting solutions using QlikSense or similar BI tools
Extract, transform, and analyze data using SQL, primarily from ERP systems
Develop KPIs and performance metrics to support operational excellence in procurement
Communicate insights, findings, and recommendations to operational and cross-functional stakeholders
Contribute to digitalization, automation, and process improvement initiatives within procurement operations
Continuously identify best practices and translate them into practical operational improvements
Your profile

We're looking for a structured, analytical, and hands-on individual who thrives in an operational environment. You are curious, proactive, and motivated by improving how things actually work in practice, not only in theory. You have a strong ""do-it attitude"" and enjoy solving real operational problems through data. With solid technical skills and strategic thinking, you're comfortable diving into complex challenges and translating them into clear, actionable insights. You take initiative without waiting for direction, and you're not afraid to roll up your sleeves and get things done. You work naturally close to the business, engaging with stakeholders across functions and turning technical knowledge into practical solutions. You're collaborative, communicative, and able to navigate a dynamic environment where priorities shift quickly. You enjoy change and actively contribute to improving processes, tools, and ways of working, combining your technical expertise with strategic perspective to drive real impact.
Qualifications:
Master of Science (MSc) in Industrial Engineering, Industrial Economics, Mechanical Engineering, Data Science, Information Systems, or similar
Experience from manufacturing, industrial operations, procurement operations, or supply chain environments
Strong proficiency in SQL, Excel, and data analysis
Experience with BI tools such as QlikSense, Power BI, Tableau, or similar
Good understanding of operational procurement processes and supply chain workflows
Experience working with ERP systems (preferably IFS)
Ability to handle, structure, and analyze large and complex datasets
Strong communication skills in both English and Swedish
Several years of relevant experience within manufacturing, procurement, or supply chain is required
Meriting experience:
Experience with operational excellence, Lean, or continuous improvement methodologies
Experience with process automation tools
Experience with AI tools and business adoption in industrial settings
Data modeling or advanced analytics experience in operational contexts

This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.
What you will be part of

Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.

Saab is a leading defense and security company with an enduring purpose, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 28,000 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.

Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defense capability of several nations. Read more about us here

4422605681,https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-manager-at-h-m-4422605681?position=3&pageNum=0&refId=bBbp%2F0yjGF0gJj54H4JmRw%3D%3D&trackingId=J30ceCitnpqncjGu9SEsQg%3D%3D,Data Analyst Manager,H&M,"Stockholm, Stockholm County, Sweden","Job Description
WHAT YOU’LL DO​

As a Data Analytics Manager you will lead and develop a team of Data Analysts within the In Season Optimization area, while driving both business delivery and transformation initiatives. This role combines strategic and operational responsibility with people leadership, where your focus will be to enable business impact through data.

The In-Season Optimization mission is to secure capabilities, processes, and insights to get the right product to the right place at the right time, supporting product allocation, availability, and pricing decisions across channels.
You will:
Lead, coach, and develop a team of Data Analysts to strengthen their capabilities and support their career growth
Drive the RUN and TRANSFORMATION agenda, ensuring strong delivery aligned with business goals
Identify and lead strategic areas of analysis to uncover opportunities and improve performance
Work hands-on with data to generate insights using modern analytics and business intelligence tools

4425452871,https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-analyst-at-multimind-bemanning-ab-4425452871?position=4&pageNum=0&refId=bBbp%2F0yjGF0gJj54H4JmRw%3D%3D&trackingId=98UpwwZq%2BH2FZZKCGuB1FA%3D%3D,Data Analyst,MultiMind Bemanning AB,"Stockholm, Stockholm County, Sweden","Är du en analytiker som drivs av att förstå användarbeteenden och omsätta data till konkreta förbättringar? Vill du arbeta nära produktutveckling, användarupplevelse och affär där dina insikter påverkar hur miljontals användare interagerar med digitala tjänster? Då kan detta vara uppdraget för dig.
Om verksamheten

Vår kund är en av Sveriges mest välkända digitala medieaktörer med ett starkt fokus på att utveckla användarupplevelser i världsklass. Organisationen befinner sig i en spännande digital utvecklingsresa där data, teknik och användarbehov står i centrum.

Du blir en del av ett team som ansvarar för den digitala upplevelsen i app och webb med fokus på användarnas konsumtion av innehåll i realtid. Teamets mål är att skapa engagerande användarresor som får besökare att hitta rätt innehåll, stanna kvar längre och interagera med plattformen.
Uppdraget är placerat i Centrala Stockholm med möjlighet till hybridarbete.
Om rollen

Som analytiker arbetar du nära produktteam, redaktionella funktioner och andra intressenter för att förstå användarbeteenden och identifiera utvecklingsmöjligheter. Du ansvarar för att analysera publikdata och omsätta insikter till rekommendationer som bidrar till förbättrade funktioner, användarresor och användarupplevelser.
Du kommer att ha en central roll i att stötta produktutveckling och verksamhetsbeslut genom datadrivna analyser och uppföljning.
I rollen arbetar du bland annat med:
Analys av användarbeteenden i digitala plattformar, både app och webb
Funnel, cohort och retentionanalyser
Identifiering av förbättringsmöjligheter i digitala användarresor
Framtagning av insikter och rekommendationer till produktteam och verksamhet
Uppföljning och utvärdering av förändringar i digitala produkter
Analys av hur innehåll, produktupplevelse och distribution samverkar för att skapa användarvärde
Arbete med tracking, datainsamling och analysverktyg
Om dig
Vi söker dig som har några års erfarenhet av analysarbete inom digitala produkter och som trivs i en verksamhet där förändring, utveckling och samarbete är en naturlig del av vardagen.
Du är nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och har förmågan att se samband mellan data, användarbeteende och affärsmål. Samtidigt är du pedagogisk och trygg i att kommunicera insikter till olika målgrupper.
Vi ser gärna att du har:
2 till 3 års erfarenhet som analytiker inom produktutveckling för publika digitala plattformar
Erfarenhet från exempelvis digital media, streamingtjänster, e handel eller liknande verksamheter
God erfarenhet av Googles analys och dataplattformar
Erfarenhet av Google Tag Manager för både app och webb
Grundläggande kunskaper i SQL
Erfarenhet av att arbeta i tvärfunktionella produktteam
Relevant akademisk utbildning inom exempelvis datavetenskap eller motsvarande
Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska i tal och skrift
Det är meriterande om du även har:
Erfarenhet av Looker Studio, Data Studio eller Power BI
Kunskap om rekommendationssystem och personaliseringsalgoritmer
Intresse för digitala beteendetrender, nya plattformar och förändringar inom algoritmer och användarbeteenden
Som person är du:
Analytisk och strukturerad
Kommunikativ och pedagogisk
Samarbetsorienterad och prestigelös
Nyfiken och utvecklingsdriven
Självständig samtidigt som du trivs i team
Lösningsorienterad med ett starkt användarfokus
Om uppdraget
Start: September 2026
Omfattning: Heltid
Uppdragsperiod: Till juni 2027
Placering: Centrala Stockholm
Hybridarbete erbjuds med möjlighet att arbeta hemifrån upp till två dagar per vecka beroende på verksamhetens behov.
Intresserad?
Urval och intervjuer sker löpande, så skicka gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.
Välkommen med din ansökan!

WHAT YOU’LL DO​

As a Senior Data Analyst in Retail Experience, you will help teams understand what the data is telling us and use those insights to improve in‑store technology and customer experiences across our stores. You will work at the intersection of data, technology, and business to make sure insights are turned into concrete actions.
→ Work hands‑on with analysis across retail tech initiatives such as self‑service checkout, in‑store systems, and customer flows
→ Translate complex data into clear insights and actionable recommendations for product teams and business stakeholders
→ Act as a data partner in product teams, challenging assumptions and helping guide data‑driven decisions
→ Drive end‑to‑end analyses, from understanding the real business need through data exploration to storytelling and conclusions
→ Help shape how the analytics function evolves as the team builds up and matures
WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH​

You will be part of the Retail Experience area and collaborate closely with product managers, product owners, and business stakeholders within Retail Tech. The role involves frequent interaction across teams working with store operations, in‑store technology, and customer‑facing solutions, as well as close collaboration with other analysts across the organisation as the analytics capability continues to grow.
WHO YOU ARE​
We are looking for people with…​
→ Applicable working experience or a Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Engineering, Business, or a related field
→ Solid experience in data analysis with a strong analytical and problem‑solving mindset
→ Experience working with SQL and either Python or R
→ The ability to work with data from multiple sources and draw meaningful conclusions
→ Experience translating analysis into insights that influence decisions, not just reporting outcomes
→ Comfort working in less structured environments with evolving requirements
And people who are…​
→ Curious, proactive, and comfortable taking ownership of their area
→ Strong communicators who can bridge technical insights and business needs
→ Interested in retail, customer behaviour, and how technology impacts real‑world experiences
→ Able to work independently while collaborating closely with product and business partners
→ Motivated by building something new and leaving a tangible mark on how analytics is used
WHO WE ARE​

H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​

We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE ​
At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. ​

We offer all our employee’s attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a 25% staff discount usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.

4431495125,https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/staff-data-analyst-at-truecaller-4431495125?position=7&pageNum=0&refId=bBbp%2F0yjGF0gJj54H4JmRw%3D%3D&trackingId=KQbsLC8V92%2BKIdyFcttcsw%3D%3D,Staff Data analyst,Truecaller,"Stockholm County, Sweden","Join Truecaller – The place where innovation meets impact!
Truecaller's mission is to build trust in communication by making it safer, smarter, and more efficient. Born in Sweden, trusted by the world, and here’s why we stand out:
We are trusted by over 450 million active users every month across 190+ countries
We identify over 15 billion calls daily, helping users avoid spam and scams
We are powered by a team of 450+ employees from 45+ nationalities

We always look for people who take initiative, own their work, and keep raising the bar. An entrepreneurial mindset matters here, especially when it turns bold ideas into real actions. We stay collaborative and focused, always searching for smarter paths forward. If you want to make an impact and grow with a team that inspires millions, you’ll fit right in.
The role:

As a Staff Data analyst, you’ll be responsible for the team's quantitative insights. From understanding our data, identifying problems, to working with product, tech, and design on hypothesizing solutions. You’ll be the driver of our experimentation and learning efforts and will collaborate with different teams.
What you will do
Understanding Truecaller's data.
Taking ownership of quantitative insights for your team, playing a crucial role in product development.
Defining experiments, overseeing their setup, and analyzing their results to drive decision-making.
Developing and maintaining key performance indicators (KPIs) for the team, ensuring their tracking, reliability, and reporting.
Creating data pipelines and dashboards to measure the team's KPIs and effectively communicate insights to both the team and leadership.
Coaching and mentoring the team on experimentation and data-driven product development processes, fostering a culture of data-driven decision-making.
What you bring in
6-10 years of experience in Data Analytics
Experience in using SQL to extract, transform, and analyse data
Experience in data visualisation tools like Looker (preferred), QlikSense, Tableau, or Power BI
Experience in mentoring, coaching, and evangelizing about data in product development
Experience in digging into different data sources to understand why specific customer behaviours happen
Fluent in spoken and written English
It would be great if you also have
Big data query tools (we use BigQuery).
Experience with data from mobile applications.
What we offer:

We support growth through learning resources, leadership programs, mentoring, and real hands-on work. People can move between teams and projects to build new skills and keep things interesting. We offer clear internal mobility and a transparent path for progression, with leaders who stay involved and provide guidance throughout the year. In addition, you will benefit from:
A comprehensive compensation package: We offer a competitive salary, 30 days of paid vacation, private health insurance, parental leave top-up, pension, and wellness contributions.
Modern tools to do your best work: Choose your preferred computer and phone within our budget, so you can work comfortably and efficiently.

A people-focused office culture: We value in-person collaboration and follow an office-first model, with some flexibility. Our offices offer a vibrant environment with opportunities to learn, connect, and recharge, from breakfast, lunch, and well-stocked snack stations and quiet spaces to team activities such as movie nights, tech meetups, and cultural events. There's something for everyone.

Truecaller’s “Lab Days” offer a space for imagination: 5 times per year for 3 days, where everyone steps away from their normal tasks to explore new, bold ideas and build things they’ve always wanted to. It’s a space where curiosity leads the way, and prototypes take shape. Some concepts even make it into production, and a few have grown into real features used by millions today. Lab Days allow you to be creative, learn fast, and help shape Truecaller's future.
Come as you are:

Truecaller is committed to building a diverse and inclusive team. We believe that a wide range of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences strengthens our products and our culture. No matter where you're from, what language you speak, or how you identify, we value what makes you unique and would love to get to know you.
Check out Life at Truecaller - Behind the code: https://www.instagram.com/lifeattruecaller/
Sounds like a great opportunity?
We will fill the position as soon as we find the right candidate, so please send your application as soon as possible. As part of the recruitment process, we will conduct a background check.
We only accept applications in English.

  • Truecaller’s “Lab Days” offer a space for imagination: 5 times per year for 3 days, where everyone steps away from their normal tasks to explore new, bold ideas and build things they’ve always wanted to. It’s a space where curiosity leads the way, and prototypes take shape. Some concepts even make it into production, and a few have grown into real features used by millions today. Lab Days allow you to be creative, learn fast, and help shape Truecaller's future.


Come as you are:

Truecaller is committed to building a diverse and inclusive team. We believe that a wide range of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences strengthens our products and our culture. 4428967097,https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-data-analyst-at-evolution-4428967097?position=9&pageNum=0&refId=bBbp%2F0yjGF0gJj54H4JmRw%3D%3D&trackingId=F3x9coO1Lg9lzAk1D1ligg%3D%3D,Senior Data Analyst,Evolution,"Stockholm, Stockholm County, Sweden","Evolution RNG is the dedicated slots division of Evolution, a world-leading innovator in online casino solutions.
We bring together the industry’s most creative and successful slot brands under one powerhouse umbrella: Nolimit City, NetEnt, Red Tiger, Big Time Gaming, Sneaky Slots and Tap-A-Roo.

Our mission is to build scalable, high-impact entertainment for players and operators worldwide while pushing the boundaries of slot mechanics and player engagement. By balancing creative product development with operational excellence, we deliver top-tier gaming content across the globe.
Job Description

We are looking for a Senior Data Analyst to join the Evolution RNG Division in Stockholm. This role will operate at divisional level and be responsible for shaping, delivering and governing key data capabilities that support decision-making, operational effectiveness and risk management across the RNG organisation.

The successful candidate will be a booster for teams across Commercial, Product, Fraud, Customer Support, Engineering and Operations. This person will be expected to bring structure, ownership and forward-looking thinking to critical data assets, reporting, monitoring routines and governance practices across RNG.
Key Responsibilities
Business Intelligence & Data Analytics
Provide organisational support for RNG by handling ad-hoc data requests covering commercial performance, product data, fraud detection and Tier 2 customer support / operator issues.
Lead the creation, maintenance and continuous improvement of Tableau dashboards used across RNG, including governance of user access, licences and permission levels.
Contribute to the unification and maintenance of RNG data resources, supporting data governance standards, data consistency and effective usage across the organisation.
Translate business needs into robust datasets, reporting solutions and practical governance improvements that reduce manual effort and improve decision quality across the RNG organisation.
Drive data-related projects from concept through implementation, collaborating across functions to deliver measurable business value.
Promote strong standards in data quality, documentation, governance and stakeholder communication across the RNG Division.
Fraud Monitoring
Further develop fraud monitoring toolset and data framework across all RNG game providers.
Drive the further advancement of fraud detection capabilities, ensuring that monitoring approaches remain effective as game complexity evolves.
Work towards improving the scope, accuracy and effectiveness of the fraud detection toolset and related monitoring processes.
Help improve monitoring practices, operational routines and data structures that enable earlier detection of anomalies, player exploits, defects and suspicious behaviour.
Qualifications
Several years of experience in data analytics, business intelligence, analytics engineering or a comparable senior data role.
Strong SQL capability and proven experience building analytical datasets, reporting layers and decision-support solutions.
Demonstrated experience working with BI tools such as Tableau, Power BI, Superset or similar platforms, including ownership of reporting assets and user enablement.
Ability to operate credibly with senior stakeholders and to balance hands-on delivery with broader ownership and prioritisation.
Experience working with data governance, data quality improvement and cross-functional collaboration in complex environments.
Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail and an ability to work effectively in ambiguous or evolving problem spaces.
Excellent communication skills in English, both written and spoken, with the ability to explain complex findings clearly to technical and non-technical audiences.
A proactive, structured and outcome-focused mindset with the ability to independently drive work forward.
Nice to Have
Experience with AWS technologies such as Athena
Experience with data management, data catalogues or operational data tools such as no-code database platforms.
Exposure to fraud analytics, anomaly detection, game monitoring or risk-related analytical domains.
Experience with Python or other scripting languages for automation and advanced analysis.
Experience with version control and development best practices such as Git and CI/CD workflows.
Background in gaming, iGaming or other digitally native, data-rich environments.
Additional Information
Our benefits are
Competitive pension, health and medical insurance
30 paid vacation days
Fitness benefit (Friskvårdsbidrag)
Professional growth
Sport activities, parties, team buildings

Whether you’re exploring the next big release on our roadmap or revisiting a legend in our games section. If you want to be part of one of the most exciting industries in the world, then apply now and be a key player in our success story!
This is a 100% on-site position. Based in Stockholm, Sweden.

4430290949,https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/lead-data-analyst-at-hybrus-group-4430290949?position=11&pageNum=0&refId=bBbp%2F0yjGF0gJj54H4JmRw%3D%3D&trackingId=YJRTgBsxQR8OAXCUrxPbsA%3D%3D,Lead Data Analyst,Hybrus Group,"Stockholm, Stockholm County, Sweden","Company Description Hybrus Group is a forward-thinking IT services and consulting firm focused on digital transformation, cloud solutions, AI-powered automation, and enterprise technology strategy. The company supports clients across manufacturing, healthcare IT, utilities, banking, financial services, and defense, helping them scale, innovate, and operate more efficiently.

Its experts deliver tailored solutions in cloud migration and DevOps, AI/ML integration, cybersecurity and compliance, ERP and CRM implementation, and data analytics and business intelligence. Hybrus Group maintains a client-first approach and specializes in building resilient, future-ready digital ecosystems. The organization values collaboration, technical excellence, and a passion for solving complex challenges.
The role is for a client based in Stockholm for a contract of 6 months (with potential extensions).

Role Description The Lead Data Analyst will oversee end-to-end data analytics initiatives, guiding the design, implementation, and optimization of data solutions for Hybrus Group’s clients. This contract role is based in Malmo with a hybrid work arrangement, combining on-site collaboration with flexibility to work from home. Day-to-day responsibilities include leading data analysis projects, building and validating data models, performing statistical analysis, and translating complex findings into clear insights and recommendations for stakeholders. The Lead Data Analyst will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, mentor junior analysts, define best practices in data governance, and support data-driven decision-making across multiple industries. The role also involves preparing reports and dashboards, ensuring data quality, and contributing to continuous improvement of analytics frameworks and tools.
Qualifications
5+ years in analytics or data science role
column2: able to work independently.

column1: Strong Analytical Skills and proficiency in Data Analytics for interpreting complex datasets and driving actionable insights.
Solid foundation in Statistics to perform rigorous quantitative analysis, hypothesis testing, and predictive modeling.
Experience in Data Modeling, including designing, optimizing, and maintaining logical and physical data models.
Excellent Communication skills to present technical findings clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Experience with SQL and modern BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Qlik) for reporting and dashboard development.
Hands-on experience with data warehousing, ETL processes, and cloud-based data platforms (e.g., Azure, AWS, GCP).
Fluency with programming languages used in analytics (e.g., Python, R).
Previous experience leading data or analytics projects, including mentoring team members and managing client expectations.
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related quantitative field.
Ability to work effectively in Stockhom, demonstrating strong collaboration and self-management skills.
Nice to have
● Familiarity with recommender systems internals - retrieval, ranking, candidate generation, offline vs. online evaluation.
● Exposure to bandits, off-policy evaluation, or causal inference.
● Experience building data models and dashboards others depend on (dbt, Looker, or similar)
If interested, please mail to careers@hybruse.se with your latest CV, notice period, visa / citizenship status and preferred salary expectations.
Note: People who are not based in Sweden, please do not apply.

4432286021,https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/ai-konsult-till-engram-at-helicon-technologies-4432286021?position=12&pageNum=0&refId=bBbp%2F0yjGF0gJj54H4JmRw%3D%3D&trackingId=f45aar8H7bV4q5aaDUMSUw%3D%3D,AI-konsult till Engram,Helicon Technologies,"Stockholm, Stockholm County, Sweden","Om Engram

Engram är en Stockholmsbaserad AI-konsultverksamhet som hjälper företag inom Sveriges ledande sektorer - offentlig, finans, industri och tech – att ta generativ AI från idé till produktion. Vi arbetar hands-on med våra kunder och bygger riktiga system.
Om Rollen

Vi växer vårt team av seniora AI/ML Engineers. Som Senior ML Engineer hos Engram placeras du på konsultuppdrag där du tar ägarskap för att bygga, driftsätta och förvalta produktionsklara GenAI-lösningar: LLM-baserade applikationer, RAG-system, agentiska flöden och AI-driven automatisering inbäddad i affärsprocesser.

Uppdragen är typiskt 3–12 månader i olika omfattning och ofta parallellt med andra uppdrag. Domänerna sträcker sig över kundserviceautomation, interna AI-verktyg, dokumentförståelse (NLP/OCR), agentbaserade system och AI-funktionalitet i centrala affärsapplikationer.
Vad du gör
Designar och bygger produktionsklara AI-applikationer och tjänster - från PoC till skalad produktion
Utvecklar LLM-baserade funktioner med RAG, prompt engineering, embeddings och vektordatabaser
Bygger agentiska system med moderna agent-ramverk (OpenAI Agents, LangChain, MCP, Semantic Kernel)
Utvecklar skalbara backend-tjänster och API:er - främst Python/FastAPI
column2: .NET eller Go på relevanta uppdrag

column1: Integrerar AI-komponenter i befintliga dataplattformar, IT-system och företagsarkitekturer

Arvode: Marknadsmässigt, beroende på seniorititet och uppdrag

At Helicon we build digital products that matter. As a digital product development and innovation agency specializing in cleantech, we partner with forward-thinking businesses to create breakthrough products, platforms and capabilities that drive sustainability and efficiency.

Our journey has taken us from developing one of Sweden’s largest virtual power plants by connecting more than 15,000 buildings, to using AI to optimize energy, water and resource management worldwide. We have also helped launch award winning cleantech startups and SaaS solutions for the energy sector.

We measure success not only by the results we deliver to our customers but also by the real world sustainability gains our solutions create. When clients tell us that our work helped shut down a coal and oil power plant, integrate more renewables into their portfolio or cut 36,000 tons of CO₂ emissions annually, we take immense pride in that.

What drives us is a shared passion for solving complex challenges through strategy, design, engineering and data science. At Helicon speed, curiosity, collaboration and continuous learning are at the heart of how we work. If you are passionate about technology and want to make a positive impact on the planet, you will feel at home here.

4431289342,https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/consumer-analyst-at-instabee-4431289342?position=13&pageNum=0&refId=bBbp%2F0yjGF0gJj54H4JmRw%3D%3D&trackingId=ayCbVGHajPJAqFPrnXe6xA%3D%3D,Consumer Analyst,Instabee,"Stockholm, Stockholm County, Sweden","Are you passionate about building true consumer preference—turning data and insights into real user and business impact?

At Instabee, we are on a mission to become the undisputed #1 service in the eyes of our consumers. We are now looking for a Consumer Analyst to join our Consumer Department. In this role, you will play a fundamental part in building the analytical foundation and insights required to ensure our organization is aligned, informed, and accountable for delivering a superior consumer experience across all markets.
This role is ideal for someone who combines strong analytical capabilities with business acumen and the ability to communicate findings clearly to diverse stakeholders.
About The Role

As Consumer Analyst, you will translate complex data and consumer signals into clear, actionable insights that can drive strategic and tactical impact. Partnering with teams across Data & Analytics, Product, Design, Operations, Strategy and Market to understand challenges, synthesize insights from diverse sources, and co-create solutions grounded in consumer and business relevance.

Your goal is to build a solid foundation for consumer, brand, and experience analytics, making insights accessible and actionable company-wide. Whether you are mapping the behavior of different consumer segments, uncovering what drives long-term retention, or tracking the impact of a new product feature, you will play a key role in guiding our journey toward becoming the undisputed #1 service in all our markets.
What You'll Do

Manage the Consumer Scorecard: Define and evolve our core KPIs (NPS, User ratings, Brand preference, CSAT, MAU, Consumer base metrics, Operational metrics etc.) to ensure a trusted, single source of truth for our performance across the full consumer journey and lifecycle.

Analyze Loyalty & Retention: Conduct cohort and retention analysis to identify the key drivers of consumer satisfaction and long-term loyalty. You’ll explore how different user segments behave and evolve, and translate user and service delivery insights into cross-functional guidance for the most effective ways to win, delight, and retain our consumers.

Analyze Consumer Behavior: Dive deep into user behavior across web, app, communications and customer service channels. You will analyze funnels and identify drop-off points to provide concrete product and experience recommendations. This includes proactively identifying tracking gaps and defining what needs to be measured and how, to ensure decisions are grounded in reliable data.

Translate Data into Action: Synthesize quantitative and qualitative data into concise, actionable insights. You will provide a holistic lens to ensure we deliver a seamless and superior experience across the entire consumer journey.

Co-create Analytical Foundations: Partner with data and tech teams to ensure our data collection is high-quality, scalable, and reliable. You’ll help shape the tracking and data structures (e.g., GA4, BigQuery) required to turn digital behavior into trustworthy insights.
Drive Performance Insights: Enable data-driven decision-making through forecasting, trend analysis, and the development of automated dashboards in Tableau, Steep or similar tools.
Collaborative Problem Solving: Act as the consumer analytics partner for teams across Instabee, helping them move past the ""what"" to understand the ""why"" behind consumer behavior.
Drive Experimentation: Design, run, and evaluate A/B tests—taking ownership from the initial hypothesis to the final conclusion and recommended next steps.
Your profile

You are an analytical problem-solver with a natural drive to uncover patterns and understand exactly what drives consumer behavior and business performance. You are curious, proactive, and motivated by creating real-world results rather than theoretical perfection. You don't just provide data
column2: you see it as your mission to provide the actionable insights that enable our teams to deliver a great consumer experience and our business to grow.

column1: Experience & Mindset
Analytical Experience: 4-5+ years of experience in consumer analytics, digital analytics or a related field - ideally within a fast-paced service or e-commerce environment.

Commercial Curiosity: You have a strong business acumen and a natural drive to understand the ""why"" behind the numbers. You focus on what is relevant and actionable for the business, and proactively surface insights and opportunities.

Problem Solver: Strong analytical and numerical skills with a business-oriented mindset. You excel at bringing structure to ambiguous problems and can navigate complex datasets to find the most impactful answers.

Communication: You can translate complex analysis into sharp, actionable narratives for diverse stakeholders. You communicate insights clearly and confidently to stakeholders at all levels, from junior teams to senior leadership.
Collaboration: Team player who enjoys working across Product, Tech, and Business teams to develop insights and build solutions together.
Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, IT, Statistics, Business, or other relevant field.
Analytical toolkit
Consumer Analytics: Proven ability to synthesize various internal and external consumer data into holistic consumer analytics and insights.
Digital Analytics: Experience with tools such as Amplitude, GA4, or similar behavioral tracking platforms.
Data Foundations: Proficiency in SQL and Python or similar, and experience working with large datasets.
Visualization: Ability to build and maintain clear dashboards and funnels that give our teams an ongoing view of consumer health (e.g., using Tableau, Power BI, or Steep).
AI coding tools: Experience in using AI tools in your analytical work is an advantage.
Experimentation: Hands-on experience designing, running, and evaluating A/B tests is an advantage.
Tracking: Knowledge of digital tracking implementation and Google Tag Manager is an advantage.
What You'll Get

We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. If you like changes and want to set new processes and ways of working - this is the place for you!
Benefits
Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
Sky-High Office: Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
Puppy Friendly: Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
Fun & Games: Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
Parental Pay for Six Months: Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
A Day Off on Your Birthday: We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
Hybrid setup and flexible working hours
Get to know us

In 2022, Instabee was founded after combining Budbee and Instabox - two leading last-mile delivery companies with three consumer-facing brands: Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy. Instabee serves millions of consumers across Europe with convenient deliveries and is on track to become the leading European e-commerce enabler. Always with the consumer at heart.

We’re fast, both in terms of parcel delivery and when it comes to growing our business. So far our journey has taken us from Sweden to the rest of Scandinavia and parts of continental Europe, but we have no plans on stopping anytime soon. As we continue to expand, the complexity of Instabee grows in parallel. With that in mind, we’re now looking for you to help us on the journey ahead.

This recruitment process consists of background checks via Svens Bakgrundsanalys as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.

We are reviewing applications continuously. However, please note that due to the summer holiday period, the recruitment process will be paused from June 26th to August 3rd. We will get back to all candidates after we return.

Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.

Are you passionate about building true consumer preference—turning data and insights into real user and business impact?

At Instabee, we are on a mission to become the undisputed #1 service in the eyes of our consumers. We are now looking for a Consumer Analyst to join our Consumer Department. In this role, you will play a fundamental part in building the analytical foundation and insights required to ensure our organization is aligned, informed, and accountable for delivering a superior consumer experience across all markets.

This role is ideal for someone who combines strong analytical capabilities with business acumen and the ability to communicate findings clearly to diverse stakeholders.

About The Role

As Consumer Analyst, you will translate complex data and consumer signals into clear, actionable insights that can drive strategic and tactical impact. Partnering with teams across Data &
column2:
Analytics, Product, Design, Operations, Strategy and Market to understand challenges, synthesize insights from diverse sources, and co-create solutions grounded in consumer and business relevance.

Your goal is to build a solid foundation for consumer, brand, and experience analytics, making insights accessible and actionable company-wide. Whether you are mapping the behavior of different consumer segments, uncovering what drives long-term retention, or tracking the impact of a new product feature, you will play a key role in guiding our journey toward becoming the undisputed #1 service in all our markets.

What You'll Do

  • Manage the Consumer Scorecard: Define and evolve our core KPIs (NPS, User ratings, Brand preference, CSAT, MAU, Consumer base metrics, Operational metrics etc.) to ensure a trusted, single source of truth for our performance across the full consumer journey and lifecycle.
  • Analyze Loyalty &
column3:
Retention: Conduct cohort and retention analysis to identify the key drivers of consumer satisfaction and long-term loyalty. You’ll explore how different user segments behave and evolve, and translate user and service delivery insights into cross-functional guidance for the most effective ways to win, delight, and retain our consumers.
  • Analyze Consumer Behavior: Dive deep into user behavior across web, app, communications and customer service channels. You will analyze funnels and identify drop-off points to provide concrete product and experience recommendations. This includes proactively identifying tracking gaps and defining what needs to be measured and how, to ensure decisions are grounded in reliable data.
  • Translate Data into Action: Synthesize quantitative and qualitative data into concise, actionable insights. You will provide a holistic lens to ensure we deliver a seamless and superior experience across the entire consumer journey.
  • Co-create Analytical Foundations: Partner with data and tech teams to ensure our data collection is high-quality, scalable, and reliable. You’ll help shape the tracking and data structures (e.g., GA4, BigQuery) required to turn digital behavior into trustworthy insights.
  • Drive Performance Insights: Enable data-driven decision-making through forecasting, trend analysis, and the development of automated dashboards in Tableau, Steep or similar tools.
  • Collaborative Problem Solving: Act as the consumer analytics partner for teams across Instabee, helping them move past the ""what"" to understand the ""why"" behind consumer behavior.
  • Drive Experimentation: Design, run, and evaluate A/B tests—taking ownership from the initial hypothesis to the final conclusion and recommended next steps.

    • Your profile

    You are an analytical problem-solver with a natural drive to uncover patterns and understand exactly what drives consumer behavior and business performance. You are curious, proactive, and motivated by creating real-world results rather than theoretical perfection. You don't just provide data
column4:
you see it as your mission to provide the actionable insights that enable our teams to deliver a great consumer experience and our business to grow.

Experience &
column5:
Mindset

  • Analytical Experience: 4-5+ years of experience in consumer analytics, digital analytics or a related field - ideally within a fast-paced service or e-commerce environment.
  • Commercial Curiosity: You have a strong business acumen and a natural drive to understand the ""why"" behind the numbers. You focus on what is relevant and actionable for the business, and proactively surface insights and opportunities.
  • Problem Solver: Strong analytical and numerical skills with a business-oriented mindset. You excel at bringing structure to ambiguous problems and can navigate complex datasets to find the most impactful answers.
  • Communication: You can translate complex analysis into sharp, actionable narratives for diverse stakeholders. You communicate insights clearly and confidently to stakeholders at all levels, from junior teams to senior leadership.
  • Collaboration: Team player who enjoys working across Product, Tech, and Business teams to develop insights and build solutions together.
  • Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, IT, Statistics, Business, or other relevant field.

Analytical toolkit

  • Consumer Analytics: Proven ability to synthesize various internal and external consumer data into holistic consumer analytics and insights.
  • Digital Analytics: Experience with tools such as Amplitude, GA4, or similar behavioral tracking platforms.
  • Data Foundations: Proficiency in SQL and Python or similar, and experience working with large datasets.
  • Visualization: Ability to build and maintain clear dashboards and funnels that give our teams an ongoing view of consumer health (e.g., using Tableau, Power BI, or Steep).
  • AI coding tools: Experience in using AI tools in your analytical work is an advantage.
  • Experimentation: Hands-on experience designing, running, and evaluating A/B tests is an advantage.
  • Tracking: Knowledge of digital tracking implementation and Google Tag Manager is an advantage.

What You'll Get

We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. If you like changes and want to set new processes and ways of working - this is the place for you!

Benefits

Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:

  • Sky-High Office: Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
  • Puppy Friendly: Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
  • Fun &
column6:
Games: Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
  • Parental Pay for Six Months: Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
  • A Day Off on Your Birthday: We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
  • Hybrid setup and flexible working hours

    • Get to know us

    In 2022, Instabee was founded after combining Budbee and Instabox - two leading last-mile delivery companies with three consumer-facing brands: Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy. Instabee serves millions of consumers across Europe with convenient deliveries and is on track to become the leading European e-commerce enabler. Always with the consumer at heart.

    We’re fast, both in terms of parcel delivery and when it comes to growing our business. So far our journey has taken us from Sweden to the rest of Scandinavia and parts of continental Europe, but we have no plans on stopping anytime soon. As we continue to expand, the complexity of Instabee grows in parallel. With that in mind, we’re now looking for you to help us on the journey ahead.

    This recruitment process consists of background checks via Svens Bakgrundsanalys as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.

    We are reviewing applications continuously. However, please note that due to the summer holiday period, the recruitment process will be paused from June 26th to August 3rd. We will get back to all candidates after we return.

    Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.
