4418897508,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/working-student-ai-management-consulting-nordics-at-process-analytics-factory-pafnow-by-celonis-4418897508?position=18&pageNum=0&refId=UbdSZWjZ%2F3fZumGCn0qyWQ%3D%3D&trackingId=I%2BgjEXJvnQ%2Bzy2fFruRv%2BQ%3D%3D,Working Student AI & Management Consulting (Nordics),Process Analytics Factory - PAFnow by Celonis,"Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark","Celonis is the global leader in Process Intelligence and the pioneer of Process Mining technology. As one of the world’s fastest-growing enterprise SaaS companies, we are changemakers pushing the boundaries of what’s possible. We invest heavily in advanced AI capabilities—specifically our Process Intelligence Graph—to turn data insights into immediate business action. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock global productivity and sustainability by placing intelligence at the core of every business process. Join our mission to make processes work for people, companies, and the planet.
The Team

As a Working Student in AI & Management Consulting you join our Value Engineering team to focus on driving and closing opportunities by identifying and selling the value Celonis can bring to customers. Our Value Engineers (VE) are the trusted advisor for customers and work on the intersection of technology and business. VEs don't just understand code
column2: they understand the entire architecture of a deal. By bridging the gap between deep technical capability, customer pain points, and revenue mechanics, it stands out as one of the most high-impact roles in tech

column1: The Role
As a VE Working Student, you will sit at the intersection of data engineering, process intelligence, and business strategy. You won't just support the team
column2: you will actively build data-driven solutions within the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform to uncover hidden inefficiencies for companies across the Nordics market. This is a highly analytical role where you will translate complex business challenges into technical requirements, using SQL/PQL, data modeling, and AI capabilities to transform raw data into million-dollar business cases

column1: The work you’ll do
Mine & Model Data: Use the Celonis platform to analyze complex business processes, exposing hidden inefficiencies and engineering absolute operational transparency.
Architect Use Cases: Translate high-level customer business challenges into rigorous technical requirements, building actionable, data-driven use cases within the Process Intelligence Platform.
Deploy Advanced Analytics: Leverage Celonis data modeling, SQL/PQL, and native AI capabilities to generate deep insights and optimize enterprise-scale operations.
Align AI & Tech Strategy: Evaluate and integrate Celonis solutions and AI features to map directly into a customer’s broader enterprise technology roadmap.
Quantify Financial ROI: Transform raw data findings into hard financial metrics, building management-ready presentations that prove the exact operational value of implemented solutions.
Pitch to Stakeholders: Partner with cross-functional project teams to deliver technical findings and strategic, data-backed recommendations straight to customer decision-makers.
Bridge Tech & Business: Act as the ultimate product and analytical expert, translating complex data-driven solutions into clear corporate value.
The Qualifications You Need
Student of Business Analytics / Industrial Engineering / Business Informatics / Technology & Management / Economics / Mathematics or of a comparable program
Strong communicational skills and interest in interacting with potential customers
Experience in consulting and highly interested in Data Analytics
Knowledge in SQL and Python or related database query languages (completion of Celonis ""Rising Star"" modules would be a plus)
Confidence to present to senior stakeholders and larger audiences
Passionate for data, OpenAI and LLMs and the impact it can have on the world
Analytical mindset and the ability to multi-task, prioritize and execute
Fluent in English, with professional proficiency in a Nordic language highly preferred to effectively support our Nordics business development and stakeholders.
Availability for at least 6-8 months, ideally longer.
What Celonis Can Offer You
Pioneer Innovation: Work with the global leader in Process Mining and the Process Intelligence Graph to shape the future of AI-driven business operations.
Ownership from Day 1: Every full-time ""Celonaut"" is an owner, receiving Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and merit-based refresh grants.

Unrivaled Family Support: Benefit from our inclusive parental leave policy—24 weeks of fully paid leave for primary carers and 12 weeks for supporting carers, available from your first day of employment.
Work-Life Integration: Enjoy Unlimited PTO (in applicable regions) and generous PTO globally, as well as a flexible hybrid work model that balances remote focus with vibrant office collaboration.
Continuous Growth: Elevate your skills through our 70-20-10 learning framework, mentorship programs, and access to a dedicated learning platform.
Holistic Well-being: Prioritize your health with subsidized Wellhub memberships, mental health counseling, and dedicated ""Wellness Weeks"" that prioritize work/life balance.
Drive Sustainability: Participate in annual Impact Days, where you receive paid time off to volunteer for community and environmental causes with your local office, or virtually.
Global Inclusion & Belonging: Find community through our Inclusion Think Tank and participate in our annual Inclusion Days, ensuring every voice is heard and valued.
Value-Driven Impact: Join a mission-led organization where our core values—Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future—drive every decision.
About Us

Celonis makes processes work — for people, companies, and the planet. Powered by process mining and AI, the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform integrates process data and business context to create a living digital twin of business operations. We enable thousands of companies worldwide to understand how their business actually runs and, together with their partners, build intelligent solutions that transform and continuously improve the way they operate — unlocking billions in value. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.
Get familiar with the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform by watching this video.
Celonis Inclusion Statement

At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up and knows their voice is heard - that's when creativity and innovation happen.
Your Privacy
Any information you submit to Celonis as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Celonis’ Accessibility and Candidate Notices
By submitting this application, you confirm that you agree to the storing and processing of your personal data by Celonis as described in our Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process.
Please be aware of common job offer scams, impersonators and frauds. Learn more here.

Our Value Engineers (VE) are the trusted advisor for customers and work on the intersection of technology and business. VEs don't just understand code
column3:
they understand the entire architecture of a deal. By bridging the gap between deep technical capability, customer pain points, and revenue mechanics, it stands out as one of the most high-impact roles in tech

The Role

As a VE Working Student, you will sit at the intersection of data engineering, process intelligence, and business strategy. You won't just support the team
column4:
you will actively build data-driven solutions within the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform to uncover hidden inefficiencies for companies across the Nordics market. This is a highly analytical role where you will translate complex business challenges into technical requirements, using SQL/PQL, data modeling, and AI capabilities to transform raw data into million-dollar business cases

The work you’ll do

  • Mine &
column5:
Model Data: Use the Celonis platform to analyze complex business processes, exposing hidden inefficiencies and engineering absolute operational transparency.
  • Architect Use Cases: Translate high-level customer business challenges into rigorous technical requirements, building actionable, data-driven use cases within the Process Intelligence Platform.
  • Deploy Advanced Analytics: Leverage Celonis data modeling, SQL/PQL, and native AI capabilities to generate deep insights and optimize enterprise-scale operations.
  • Align AI &
column6:
Tech Strategy: Evaluate and integrate Celonis solutions and AI features to map directly into a customer’s broader enterprise technology roadmap.
  • Quantify Financial ROI: Transform raw data findings into hard financial metrics, building management-ready presentations that prove the exact operational value of implemented solutions.
  • Pitch to Stakeholders: Partner with cross-functional project teams to deliver technical findings and strategic, data-backed recommendations straight to customer decision-makers.
  • Bridge Tech &
column7:
Business: Act as the ultimate product and analytical expert, translating complex data-driven solutions into clear corporate value.

The Qualifications You Need

  • Student of Business Analytics / Industrial Engineering / Business Informatics / Technology &
column8:
Management / Economics / Mathematics or of a comparable program
  • Strong communicational skills and interest in interacting with potential customers
  • Experience in consulting and highly interested in Data Analytics
  • Knowledge in SQL and Python or related database query languages (completion of Celonis ""Rising Star"" modules would be a plus)
  • Confidence to present to senior stakeholders and larger audiences
  • Passionate for data, OpenAI and LLMs and the impact it can have on the world
  • Analytical mindset and the ability to multi-task, prioritize and execute
  • Fluent in English, with professional proficiency in a Nordic language highly preferred to effectively support our Nordics business development and stakeholders.
  • Availability for at least 6-8 months, ideally longer.

    • What Celonis Can Offer You

    • Pioneer Innovation: Work with the global leader in Process Mining and the Process Intelligence Graph to shape the future of AI-driven business operations.
    • Ownership from Day 1: Every full-time ""Celonaut"" is an owner, receiving Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and merit-based refresh grants.
    • Unrivaled Family Support: Benefit from our inclusive parental leave policy—24 weeks of fully paid leave for primary carers and 12 weeks for supporting carers, available from your first day of employment.
    • Work-Life Integration: Enjoy Unlimited PTO (in applicable regions) and generous PTO globally, as well as a flexible hybrid work model that balances remote focus with vibrant office collaboration.
    • Continuous Growth: Elevate your skills through our 70-20-10 learning framework, mentorship programs, and access to a dedicated learning platform.
    • Holistic Well-being: Prioritize your health with subsidized Wellhub memberships, mental health counseling, and dedicated ""Wellness Weeks"" that prioritize work/life balance.
    • Drive Sustainability: Participate in annual Impact Days, where you receive paid time off to volunteer for community and environmental causes with your local office, or virtually.
    • Global Inclusion &
column9:
Belonging: Find community through our Inclusion Think Tank and participate in our annual Inclusion Days, ensuring every voice is heard and valued.
  • Value-Driven Impact: Join a mission-led organization where our core values—Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future—drive every decision.

    • About Us

    Celonis makes processes work — for people, companies, and the planet. Powered by process mining and AI, the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform integrates process data and business context to create a living digital twin of business operations. We enable thousands of companies worldwide to understand how their business actually runs and, together with their partners, build intelligent solutions that transform and continuously improve the way they operate — unlocking billions in value. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.

    Get familiar with the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform by watching this video.

    Celonis Inclusion Statement

    At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up and knows their voice is heard - that's when creativity and innovation happen.

    Your Privacy

    Any information you submit to Celonis as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Celonis’ Accessibility and Candidate Notices

    By submitting this application, you confirm that you agree to the storing and processing of your personal data by Celonis as described in our Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process.

    Please be aware of common job offer scams, impersonators and frauds. Learn more here.

4430512879,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/junior-product-sustainability-data-analyst-at-sams%C3%B8e-sams%C3%B8e-4430512879?position=19&pageNum=0&refId=UbdSZWjZ%2F3fZumGCn0qyWQ%3D%3D&trackingId=X4R7Zmo4IK6KdGOUo3oivw%3D%3D,Junior Product Sustainability Data Analyst,Samsøe Samsøe,"Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark","Samsøe Samsøe is looking for a structured and detail-oriented Product Sustainability Data Analyst to join our Business Development and Product team. This part-time position supports both our Product and Sustainability functions by enhancing data quality, maintaining critical product and sustainability information, and developing Power BI dashboards to enable data-driven insights and decision-making.

This is an excellent opportunity for a bachelor's or master's student with an interest in sustainability, product development, as well as data management and analysis within the fashion industry. Ideal starting date 1st or 15th of August. Please apply by 15th of July.
What we offer in this role:
You will play a key role in initiatives that improve operational excellence, strengthen sustainability performance, and support cross-functional collaboration across the organization.
Opportunity to support the optimization of business master data, collaborate across functions, and gain experience in semantic modelling and data-driven business processes.
Main responsibilities will include:
Reporting & Data Visualization:
Design and maintain Power BI dashboards that translate the Product team's business needs into clear data insights, supporting decision-making across product and sustainability functions.
Manage data entry, organization, and quality control within responsibility, sustainability, and reporting systems.
Product Data & Certifications:
Support the collection, validation, and maintenance of product and sustainability-related data across systems and platforms.
Ensure accuracy and consistency of product information, material compositions, certifications, and supplier data.
Assist with sustainability reporting and documentation requirements.
Help identify opportunities to improve data quality, workflows, and operational processes.
GHG Accounting:
Assist in the measurement, reporting, and analysis of greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions (Scope 1, 2, and relevant Scope 3 categories) in line with the GHG Protocol.
Support the collection, validation, and consolidation of environmental data across the value chain, including materials, production, transportation, retail operations, and offices.
You are the ideal candidate if you:
Are currently pursuing a bachelor's degree or in the early stages of a master's degree in Data Analytics, Business Management, Sustainability, or a related field, and are based in Copenhagen.
Are available for a minimum of 10 hours per week.
Enjoy working with data and have an analytical mindset, with the ability to identify patterns, discrepancies, and opportunities for improvement.
Have knowledge of GHG accounting and sustainability data management.
Are comfortable working with Power BI or similar data visualisation tools.
Are highly proficient in Excel and confident creating presentations in PowerPoint.
Are structured, proactive, and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage tasks independently.
Thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced environment and enjoy working across different functions.
Have an interest in sustainability and the fashion industry.
Are fluent in English, both written and spoken.
As our workforce is increasingly more international, our corporate language is English. If you can identify with our concept and our ambitions, we look forward to receiving your application.

We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive environment and encourage everyone to apply for the position, regardless of age, national and cultural background, gender identity, religion, sexual orientation, or disability.
WHO ARE WE?
Our story, brand, and vision

Samsøe Samsøe dates back to 1993, when a small jewellery shop opened in Copenhagen’s Latin Quarter. The label soon expanded to include premium T-shirts and knitwear, primarily for men. In 2000, the current owners took over the brand, transforming it into an international fashion house focusing on contemporary clothes, footwear and accessories for men and women.

With a nod to its Scandinavian heritage, Samsøe Samsøe is defined by a wearable aesthetic that combines the utilitarian ease of Copenhagen street style with a quintessentially Scandinavian spirit. Collections transcend trends, drawing on Denmark’s renowned design tradition to result in minimalist, affordable and accessible fashion.

4395329902,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/unsolicited-business-intelligence-data-science-at-systematic-4395329902?position=22&pageNum=0&refId=UbdSZWjZ%2F3fZumGCn0qyWQ%3D%3D&trackingId=BL6Eq9XXBotOkLn8HRjRSQ%3D%3D,Unsolicited: Business Intelligence & Data Science,Systematic,"Aarhus, Central Denmark Region, Denmark","Work With BI/data Science In An International Software Company
Are you motivated by making a difference and contributing to tomorrow’s BI/data science solutions? In which case you might be our new colleague.
You will create a strong foundation for strategic decisions
In your Business Intelligence or data science role, you will be working with various solutions that support Systematic’s business areas.
This involves the development of products and solutions for our customers and other business units – all in close collaboration with highly skilled colleagues.
Some of the tasks you will be working with involve:
Identifying and understanding the needs of both the customer and the product organisation through close dialogue
Using data to create value for our customers
Developing, coding and implementing BI/data science solutions
Cleaning and analysing data, and implementing and developing machine learning models
Facilitating workshops and building data models that support domains, user behaviour and software
Being part of a dynamic working environment characterised by collaboration, development and quality.

You can expect to work with a range of technologies, such as Microsoft Power BI, Python, Azure Cloud, Microsoft SQL Server, T-SQL, Microsoft SSIS and SSAS, data warehousing, data modelling and analysis.
High level of interdisciplinary expertise and collaboration
We are committed to acquiring knowledge and developing methods based on a well-functioning group of BI/data science colleagues.
We enjoy a very high level of job satisfaction, and the dynamics between experienced experts and young talents contribute to a high level of development and progress.
We work closely together across the different disciplines and areas of expertise, with teams comprising project managers, consultants, data scientists, software architects and business developers.

A key characteristic of the teams at Systematic is that we dare to challenge and develop ourselves and each other. We focus on knowledge-sharing in our work, and always find more innovative ways of doing things.
You understand the importance of BI and data science
You are creative, good at spotting opportunities and think out of the box. You have a solid understanding of the interplay between people, technologies and processes.
You have strong communication skills combined with sound business acumen, and you enjoy being involved in a wide variety of assignments.
You stay calm when faced with numerous tasks and requirements, and you maintain an overview and understand how to prioritise the tasks at every stage of the project.
You are organised, analytical and you are driven by the quality of your work. You enjoy presenting new ideas and have what it takes to garner the support of your colleagues and business partners.
At the same time, you are a team player who enjoys the prospect of actively contributing to the team and participating in development activities.
You are fluent in English, both orally and in writing. It is an advantage if you speak Danish, but this is not a requirement.
We work with security classified projects and therefore, as a Systematic employee, you need to have security clearance. Read more here:
https:
//systematic.com/en-gb/careers/security-clearance/ .
Any questions?
Please feel free to get in touch by emailing us at job@systematic.com. Unsolicited applications will continually be assessed according to current vacancies.
We store your details for up to six months, and if in that period your profile matches our requirements for a new job, you will be contacted to arrange an interview.

4430560267,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/operational-data-analyst-at-bavarian-nordic-4430560267?position=23&pageNum=0&refId=UbdSZWjZ%2F3fZumGCn0qyWQ%3D%3D&trackingId=MpW%2B%2FnhcvalwhBpMDSYIOQ%3D%3D,Operational Data Analyst,Bavarian Nordic,"Kvistgård, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark","Brænder du for at omsætte data til værdifuld indsigt?

Til vores område Drug Substance søger vi en skarp og nysgerrig Operational Data Analyst, der kan være med til at styrke vores drift gennem databaserede indsigter og beslutninger. I rollen får du et tæt samarbejde med kolleger og interessenter på tværs af organisationen, hvor du omsætter komplekse data til anvendelige indsigter, der bidrager til bedre processer, højere effektivitet og stærk kvalitet.
Dine primære ansvarsområder
Analysere og fortolke operationelle data for at identificere trends, gaps og forbedringsmuligheder
Designe og udvikle dashboards og rapporter i Power BI til understøttelse af beslutningstagning
Arbejde med store datamængder – indsamle, rense og strukturere data til analyse
Anvende analytiske metoder, herunder kontrolkort, til at overvåge procesperformance og stabilitet
Omsætte forretningsbehov til datadrevne indsigter gennem stærk procesforståelse
Samarbejde med interessenter for at sikre, at indsigter er handlingsorienterede og understøtter operationelle mål
Bidrage til kontinuerlige forbedringer ved at omsætte data til klare anbefalinger
Dine kvalifikationer
Du har erfaring med at udvikle visuelle dashboards og rapporter i Power BI
Du har en kandidatuddannelse indenfor matematik, data science eller lignende
Du er superuser i Excel og har erfaring med SQL eller andre dataværktøjer
Du har stærke analytiske evner og trives med at arbejde med komplekse datasæt
Du har god forståelse for datakvalitet, datastruktur og datatransformation
Du har kendskab til procesanalyse og performanceopfølgning, fx kontrolkort eller lignende metoder
Du arbejder struktureret, detaljeorienteret og omsætter data til brugbare indsigter
Du kommunikerer flydende på dansk og engelsk, både skriftligt og mundtligt
Hvem er du?
Du er drevet af nysgerrighed og motiveres af at finde forklaringerne bag data og mønstre
Du trives med at bygge bro mellem data og forretning og omsætte tal til indsigter
Du kommunikerer klart og kan tilpasse dine budskaber til forskellige interessenter
Du trives i et dynamisk og tværgående arbejdsmiljø
Det tilbyder vi
En rolle, hvor du kan gøre en mærkbar forskel for den operationelle performance
Tæt samarbejde med forretningen og data teams
Mulighed for at udvikle både dine analytiske kompetencer og din forretningsforståelse
Et samarbejdsorienteret og støttende arbejdsmiljø
Klar til at gøre en forskel?
Vi afholder samtaler løbende og ser frem til at modtage dit CV.
Vi beder venligst headhuntere og rekrutteringsbureauer om ikke at kontakte os vedrørende denne stilling.

Bavarian Nordic is a global vaccine company with a mission to improve health and save lives through innovative vaccines. We are a preferred supplier of mpox and smallpox vaccines to governments to enhance public health preparedness and have a leading portfolio of travel vaccines. We are headquartered in Denmark and have manufacturing, research, and sales offices across Europe and North America.

Bavarian Nordic is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applications will receive consideration for employment and will not be discriminated against based on race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status.
For more information, visit www.bavarian-nordic.com

  • Anvende analytiske metoder, herunder kontrolkort, til at overvåge procesperformance og stabilitet
  • Omsætte forretningsbehov til datadrevne indsigter gennem stærk procesforståelse
  • Samarbejde med interessenter for at sikre, at indsigter er handlingsorienterede og understøtter operationelle mål
  • Bidrage til kontinuerlige forbedringer ved at omsætte data til klare anbefalinger


Dine kvalifikationer


  • Du har erfaring med at udvikle visuelle dashboards og rapporter i Power BI
  • Du har en kandidatuddannelse indenfor matematik, data science eller lignende
  • Du er superuser i Excel og har erfaring med SQL eller andre dataværktøjer
  • Du har stærke analytiske evner og trives med at arbejde med komplekse datasæt
  • Du har god forståelse for datakvalitet, datastruktur og datatransformation
  • Du har kendskab til procesanalyse og performanceopfølgning, fx kontrolkort eller lignende metoder
  • Du arbejder struktureret, detaljeorienteret og omsætter data til brugbare indsigter
  • Du kommunikerer flydende på dansk og engelsk, både skriftligt og mundtligt


Hvem er du?


  • Du er drevet af nysgerrighed og motiveres af at finde forklaringerne bag data og mønstre
  • Du trives med at bygge bro mellem data og forretning og omsætte tal til indsigter
  • Du kommunikerer klart og kan tilpasse dine budskaber til forskellige interessenter
  • Du trives i et dynamisk og tværgående arbejdsmiljø


Det tilbyder vi


  • En rolle, hvor du kan gøre en mærkbar forskel for den operationelle performance
  • Tæt samarbejde med forretningen og data teams
  • Mulighed for at udvikle både dine analytiske kompetencer og din forretningsforståelse
  • Et samarbejdsorienteret og støttende arbejdsmiljø


Klar til at gøre en forskel?

Vi afholder samtaler løbende og ser frem til at modtage dit CV.

Vi beder venligst headhuntere og rekrutteringsbureauer om ikke at kontakte os vedrørende denne stilling.


Bavarian Nordic is a global vaccine company with a mission to improve health and save lives through innovative vaccines. We are a preferred supplier of mpox and smallpox vaccines to governments to enhance public health preparedness and have a leading portfolio of travel vaccines. We are headquartered in Denmark and have manufacturing, research, and sales offices across Europe and North America.


Bavarian Nordic is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applications will receive consideration for employment and will not be discriminated against based on race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status.

For more information, visit www.bavarian-nordic.com

4431700803,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/junior-analytics-engineer-at-danish-endurance-4431700803?position=24&pageNum=0&refId=UbdSZWjZ%2F3fZumGCn0qyWQ%3D%3D&trackingId=JS%2BjONLX1T2HBNaBUaVfDQ%3D%3D,Junior Analytics Engineer,DANISH ENDURANCE,"Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark","Do you have a passion for Sports & Outdoor?
Do you thrive at the intersection of data, automation, and AI?
Do you love finding ways to make complex processes simpler through data?
Apply now and become part of our great team at DANISH ENDURANCE®!

We are looking for a talented and ambitious Junior Analytics Engineer to help drive our automation and AI journey - and to contribute to the continuous development and growth of our brand of endurance and outdoor gear.
Who is DANISH ENDURANCE®?

DANISH ENDURANCE® is a global endurance & outdoor brand within e-commerce. With a focus on Danish design and sustainable manufacturing in Europe and Asia, we are a young high-growth company, with a flat structure and a friendly, dynamic working environment. We are a truly international team consisting of 70 professionals with 25 different nationalities based in Copenhagen at Holmen and Gramrode near Horsens.
We have a scalable and unique business model, our ambitions are rocket-high, and we strongly believe that everything is possible. That is why we need you!
What can you expect from the job?
As Our Junior Analytics Engineer, You Will
Build and maintain ELT pipelines, and model the ingested data to business needs in dbt
Drive process optimization and automation initiatives
Help take automations and agentic workflows into production - and grow into the architecture and hosting behind them
Build data products people use - dashboards, automated reports, and ad-hoc analyses
Ensure data quality and maintain documentation
Participate in ML/AI projects and help to execute on our AI roadmap
What do we expect from you?
Curious - you want to understand how things work end to end, not just make them run
Reliable and solution-oriented - you take ownership and see things through
Eager to learn and quick to adapt in a fast-moving environment
Design, implement, and maintain automation pipelines that reduce manual work across the business
Develop (agentic) solutions using modern AI tools and frameworks
Transform complex business requirements into efficient, scalable technical solutions
Proactively identify opportunities for process improvement and see them through to delivery
Collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
Qualifications
You don’t need to tick every box — but solid hands-on experience with several of the following is what we’re after:
Degree in Data Science, Business Analytics, Computer Science, or a related field
Working knowledge of SQL
Familiarity with data modelling and a cloud data warehouse (we use BigQuery)
Experience with agentic development/AI automations
Experience with dbt and version control (Git)
Experience with data analysis and visualization tools
Experience with Python
Business process optimization experience
Bonus: exposure to deploying solutions in production - hosting, architecture, CI/CD
Passion for sports is a bonus
Additional Facts
Weekly working hours: Full time
Location: Copenhagen Holmen, at Talent Garden Rainmaking
Deadline: We will review applications on an ongoing basis, the sooner you apply, the better
Start date: As soon as possible
How To Apply
Please apply via the Hub. Please include both your CV and motivational letter in one document, as you can only uploade one document to your application.
Read more about DANISH ENDURANCE® at www.danishendurance.com
KEEP YOUR PERSONAL DATA SAFE

Danish Endurance takes responsibility for the protection of your personal data. Accordingly, upon receiving your job application and additional material you choose to submit, we keep it in a safe and secure environment and ensure confidentiality.

You also have a role to play in keeping your personal data safe. We request you only submit personal data about yourself in your job application, CV or other relevant material you choose to provide to us that is relevant for the specific position you are applying for.

(Please consider whether there is personal information you are about to submit, such as health information, that is not necessary for our recruitment process or the position you are applying for. Please also be aware of certificates or other documents that are not necessary for the vacancy.

Analytics Engineer, Data Solutions, Data Engineering and/or Data Specialist experience.

Thorough and detail-oriented, strong adaptability and focus to deliver results.
Self-driven, with the ability to deliver towards large initiatives as part of a cross-functional squad.

Positive can-do attitude, with natural curiosity and bravery to cha llenge constructively.
Willing to travel 10 days a year.
Fluent English skills both verbal and written.

Applications are reviewed on an ongoing basis. However, please note we do amend or withdraw our jobs and reserve the right to do so at any time, including prior to any advertised closing date. So, if you're interested in this role we encourage you to apply as soon as possible.

Family Care Leave - We offer enhanced paid leave options for those important times.
Insurances – All colleagues are covered by our life and disability insurance which provides protection and peace of mind.
Wellbeing - We want our people to feel well and thrive. We offer resources and benefits to nurture physical and mental wellbeing along with opportunities to build community and inspire creativity.

Bonus - We do our best work to succeed together. When goals are reached and if eligible, you'll be rewarded through our bonus scheme.

Our hybrid work policy means an average of 3 days per week in the office. The hiring team will discuss the policy and role eligibility with you during the recruitment process.

Children are our role models. Their curiosity, creativity and imagination inspire everything we do. We strive to create a diverse, dynamic and inclusive culture of play at the LEGO Group, where everyone feels safe, valued and they belong.

4422912071,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-engineer-at-cvation-part-of-skaylink-4422912071?position=26&pageNum=0&refId=UbdSZWjZ%2F3fZumGCn0qyWQ%3D%3D&trackingId=MrB2iscmesaz467CmchqYA%3D%3D,Data Engineer,cVation - Part of Skaylink,"Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark","Azure Data Engineer

Som Data Engineer hos cVation bygger du innovative dataplatforme og datawarehouses i Azure. Du arbejder med ETL-processer og automatisering af dataflows, og du bygger skalerbare, driftssikre løsninger for vores kunder. Vi bruger teknologier som Fabric, Databricks, Spark, Azure Data Factory, Terraform, Git og CI/CD. Fokus er på data engineering, pipelines og cloud-infrastruktur.

cVation er et dansk udviklings- og konsulenthus, som bygger avancerede cloudløsninger på Azure med afsæt i markedets hurtigste og mest agile metoder. cVation blev stiftet i 2014, har modtaget tre Børsen Gazeller og vundet Microsofts Partner Award for App Innovation tre år i træk. Vi arbejder dedikeret med agile arbejdsmetoder, DevOps og Test Driven Development. Vi sætter en ære i at levere software af den højeste kvalitet, og tager desuden principperne fra DevOps og software engineering med i vores dataprojekter, hvilket betyder, at tests, Infrastructure as Code og automatisering er i fokus.

Du kommer til at arbejde på et af vores dataprojekter med et projektteam bestående af arkitekter, softwareudviklere og DevOps‑specialister. Du vil have fuldt fokus på ét projekt og være tilknyttet ét team ad gangen.
Din rolle bliver at:
rådgive om og bygge datawarehouse- og dataplatformsløsninger i skyen
bidrage til design og implementering af den optimale Azure‑infrastruktur
sikre, at alt opsætning og provisionering sker som Infrastructure as Code, fx Terraform
arbejde med fuldautomatiseret overvågning, drift og skalering af løsninger
Hvad forventer vi af dig?
Du har en videregående uddannelse i software engineering, human centered AI el. lign. fra DTU, ITU eller KU samt erfaring i data engineering
Du har erfaring med at bygge datawarehouses og dataplatforme og har lyst til at arbejde med moderne data engineering

Du har erfaring med – og vil gerne blive klogere på – flere af følgende teknologier: Fabric, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, Spark, Data Warehouse, Data Platform, Python, Azure DevOps, PowerShell, Azure CLI, YAML, Bicep, Terraform, Git og CI/CD
Du vil gerne arbejde med de nyeste teknologier i Azure
Du vil gerne indgå i et agilt setup, hvor krav og retning hurtigt kan ændres, men hvor medbestemmelse og frihed er i højsædet
Det vil være en fordel, hvis du er vant til at arbejde som konsulent i et udviklingsteam i tæt samarbejde med arkitekter og software udviklere
Du har evnen til at omsætte kundebehov til handling
Du er flydende i skrift og tale på dansk og engelsk, og trives med at have den daglige kontakt med kunden

Som person er du selvstændig, ansvarsbevidst, initiativrig, eksekverende og serviceminded. Du er drevet af at lære nyt og vild med at holde dig ajour med de nyeste metoder og teknologier. Du er engageret og motiveret i alt hvad du foretager dig. Hvis du også er glad for at sparre med dygtige kollegaer og trives med at løfte i flok, vil du passe perfekt ind hos os.
Hvad tilbyder vi?

Du kommer til at indgå i vores voksende team, hvor høj faglighed, innovation og arbejdsglæde er i højsæde. Det høje faglige niveau blandt dine kollegaer giver en unik mulighed for at arbejde med de bedste, og vi tager din faglige udvikling alvorligt. Vi har en flad organisation med et minimum af administration, hvor ledelsens døre altid er åbne, og der er god plads til både bordfodbold, fredagsbar, frokost på kajen og et aktivt liv udenfor arbejdstid. Flere gange om året afholder vi hackathons, hvor vi i teams dykker ned i præcis de emner, som udviklerne finder interessante. En del af vores kultur er også, at vi gerne ser alle komme med input til hvordan vi kan optimere, udvikle og forbedre cVation.
Hvorfor vælge os som din nye arbejdsplads?

Vores fundament er løsninger bygget på Microsoft Azure Cloud. Alle vores medarbejdere mestrer cloud-native udvikling og DevOps. Vi arbejder i projekter og engagerer os hands-on i fælles teams med vores kunder for at sikre kvalitet og effektiv videndeling.

Vi er passionerede omkring at hjælpe vores kunder med at få det maksimale ud af cloudteknologien. For os er cloud ikke blot infrastruktur eller et nyt datacenter i skyen. Teknologien giver virksomheder mulighed for at skabe væsentligt mere værdi og arbejde med agilitet og innovation på en helt ny måde.

Vi har været med fra starten, da cloud blev udviklet og tilgængeligt. Vi tilbyder således vores årelange erfaring og dybe cloud ekspertise samt en værktøjskasse med alle vores best practices i form af accelerationsplatformen CADD. Den dækker over gennemprøvede værktøjer, rammeværk, effektive udviklingsmetoder og færdige automatiseringskomponenter. Alt dette for at sikre, at projekter kommer hurtigt og sikkert fra start.

Du vil blive en del af en virksomhed, som tror på, at alle har betydning, og at det skal være sjovt at gå på arbejde hver dag. Du vil få kollegaer, der er interesseret i at lære og har ønske om at blive de bedste til det, de gør. Vi tilbyder derfor gode muligheder for at udvikle dig.
Interesseret?

Klik på Easy Apply knappen, hvis du vil arbejde med de nyeste cloud-teknologier. Hvis du har under 5 års erfaring, bedes du også vedhæfte dine karakterblade i samme fil som dit CV. Vi behandler din ansøgning fortroligt og arrangerer løbende interviews.
Har du spørgsmål til jobbet, eller vil du høre mere om cVation, er du meget velkommen til at kontakte:
Maiken Pelby, Head of People & Culture, T/ 42612828, map@cvation.com
Vi ser frem til at høre fra dig!

Azure Data Engineer


Som Data Engineer hos cVation bygger du innovative dataplatforme og datawarehouses i Azure. Du arbejder med ETL-processer og automatisering af dataflows, og du bygger skalerbare, driftssikre løsninger for vores kunder. Vi bruger teknologier som Fabric, Databricks, Spark, Azure Data Factory, Terraform, Git og CI/CD. Fokus er på data engineering, pipelines og cloud-infrastruktur.


cVation er et dansk udviklings- og konsulenthus, som bygger avancerede cloudløsninger på Azure med afsæt i markedets hurtigste og mest agile metoder. cVation blev stiftet i 2014, har modtaget tre Børsen Gazeller og vundet Microsofts Partner Award for App Innovation tre år i træk. Vi arbejder dedikeret med agile arbejdsmetoder, DevOps og Test Driven Development. Vi sætter en ære i at levere software af den højeste kvalitet, og tager desuden principperne fra DevOps og software engineering med i vores dataprojekter, hvilket betyder, at tests, Infrastructure as Code og automatisering er i fokus.


Du kommer til at arbejde på et af vores dataprojekter med et projektteam bestående af arkitekter, softwareudviklere og DevOps‑specialister. Du vil have fuldt fokus på ét projekt og være tilknyttet ét team ad gangen.


Din rolle bliver at:

  • rådgive om og bygge datawarehouse- og dataplatformsløsninger i skyen
  • bidrage til design og implementering af den optimale Azure‑infrastruktur
  • sikre, at alt opsætning og provisionering sker som Infrastructure as Code, fx Terraform
  • arbejde med fuldautomatiseret overvågning, drift og skalering af løsninger


Hvad forventer vi af dig?

  • Du har en videregående uddannelse i software engineering, human centered AI el. lign. fra DTU, ITU eller KU samt erfaring i data engineering
  • Du har erfaring med at bygge datawarehouses og dataplatforme og har lyst til at arbejde med moderne data engineering
  • Du har erfaring med – og vil gerne blive klogere på – flere af følgende teknologier: Fabric, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, Spark, Data Warehouse, Data Platform, Python, Azure DevOps, PowerShell, Azure CLI, YAML, Bicep, Terraform, Git og CI/CD
  • Du vil gerne arbejde med de nyeste teknologier i Azure
  • Du vil gerne indgå i et agilt setup, hvor krav og retning hurtigt kan ændres, men hvor medbestemmelse og frihed er i højsædet
  • Det vil være en fordel, hvis du er vant til at arbejde som konsulent i et udviklingsteam i tæt samarbejde med arkitekter og software udviklere

As one of the world’s fastest-growing enterprise SaaS companies, we are changemakers pushing the boundaries of what’s possible. We invest heavily in advanced AI capabilities—specifically our Process Intelligence Graph—to turn data insights into immediate business action. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock global productivity and sustainability by placing intelligence at the core of every business process. Join our mission to make processes work for people, companies, and the planet.
The Team

As a Working Student in Applied AI Solution Consulting you join our Value Engineering team to focus on driving and closing opportunities by identifying and selling the value Celonis can bring to customers. Our Value Engineers (VE) are the trusted advisor for customers and work on the intersection of technology and business. VEs don't just understand code
column2: they understand the entire architecture of a deal. By bridging the gap between deep technical capability, customer pain points, and revenue mechanics, it stands out as one of the most high-impact roles in tech

column1: The Role
As a VE Working Student, you will sit at the intersection of data engineering, process intelligence, and business strategy. You won't just support the team
column2: you will actively build data-driven solutions within the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform to uncover hidden inefficiencies for companies across the Nordics market. This is a highly analytical role where you will translate complex business challenges into technical requirements, using SQL/PQL, data modeling, and AI capabilities to transform raw data into million-dollar business cases

column1: The work you’ll do
Mine & Model Data: Use the Celonis platform to analyze complex business processes, exposing hidden inefficiencies and engineering absolute operational transparency.
Architect Use Cases: Translate high-level customer business challenges into rigorous technical requirements, building actionable, data-driven use cases within the Process Intelligence Platform.
Deploy Advanced Analytics: Leverage Celonis data modeling, SQL/PQL, and native AI capabilities to generate deep insights and optimize enterprise-scale operations.
Align AI & Tech Strategy: Evaluate and integrate Celonis solutions and AI features to map directly into a customer’s broader enterprise technology roadmap.
Quantify Financial ROI: Transform raw data findings into hard financial metrics, building management-ready presentations that prove the exact operational value of implemented solutions.
Pitch to Stakeholders: Partner with cross-functional project teams to deliver technical findings and strategic, data-backed recommendations straight to customer decision-makers.
Bridge Tech & Business: Act as the ultimate product and analytical expert, translating complex data-driven solutions into clear corporate value.
The Qualifications You Need
Student of Business Analytics / Industrial Engineering / Business Informatics / Technology & Management / Economics / Mathematics or of a comparable program
Strong communicational skills and interest in interacting with potential customers
Experience in consulting and highly interested in Data Analytics
Knowledge in SQL and Python or related database query languages (completion of Celonis ""Rising Star"" modules would be a plus)
Confidence to present to senior stakeholders and larger audiences
Passionate for data, OpenAI and LLMs and the impact it can have on the world
Analytical mindset and the ability to multi-task, prioritize and execute
Fluent in English, with professional proficiency in a Nordic language highly preferred to effectively support our Nordics business development and stakeholders.
Availability for at least 6-8 months, ideally longer.
What Celonis Can Offer You
Pioneer Innovation: Work with the global leader in Process Mining and the Process Intelligence Graph to shape the future of AI-driven business operations.
Ownership from Day 1: Every full-time ""Celonaut"" is an owner, receiving Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and merit-based refresh grants.

Unrivaled Family Support: Benefit from our inclusive parental leave policy—24 weeks of fully paid leave for primary carers and 12 weeks for supporting carers, available from your first day of employment.
Work-Life Integration: Enjoy Unlimited PTO (in applicable regions) and generous PTO globally, as well as a flexible hybrid work model that balances remote focus with vibrant office collaboration.
Continuous Growth: Elevate your skills through our 70-20-10 learning framework, mentorship programs, and access to a dedicated learning platform.
Holistic Well-being: Prioritize your health with subsidized Wellhub memberships, mental health counseling, and dedicated ""Wellness Weeks"" that prioritize work/life balance.
Drive Sustainability: Participate in annual Impact Days, where you receive paid time off to volunteer for community and environmental causes with your local office, or virtually.
Global Inclusion & Belonging: Find community through our Inclusion Think Tank and participate in our annual Inclusion Days, ensuring every voice is heard and valued.
Value-Driven Impact: Join a mission-led organization where our core values—Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future—drive every decision.
About Us

Celonis makes processes work — for people, companies, and the planet. Powered by process mining and AI, the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform integrates process data and business context to create a living digital twin of business operations. We enable thousands of companies worldwide to understand how their business actually runs and, together with their partners, build intelligent solutions that transform and continuously improve the way they operate — unlocking billions in value. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.
Get familiar with the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform by watching this video.
Celonis Inclusion Statement

At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up and knows their voice is heard - that's when creativity and innovation happen.
Your Privacy
Any information you submit to Celonis as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Celonis’ Accessibility and Candidate Notices
By submitting this application, you confirm that you agree to the storing and processing of your personal data by Celonis as described in our Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process.
Please be aware of common job offer scams, impersonators and frauds. Learn more here.

At Toloka, we connect smart, curious people from around the world with freelance online tasks that train and improve artificial intelligence.
What We Do

The Toloka Annotators connects individuals with Generative AI projects from leading tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the full potential of AI by involving real people from around the world in the development process.
About The Role

Annotation is what helps AI make sense of the world. As an annotator, you may be invited to take part in online projects such as rating AI-generated content, evaluating factual accuracy, or comparing responses - when projects are available.
Responsibilities:
Carefully review provided data (text, images, or videos)
Label or classify content based on project guidelines
Identify and flag factually incorrect, sensitive, inappropriate, or unclear material
Important note: This is project-based work. Tasks are available only when projects are active. You may be invited to one or more projects depending on your profile and current opportunities.
Each project has its own compensation level based on scope and expertise required. On this project, AI trainers earn up to $22 per hour equivalent.
Requirements
Bachelor's degree in any discipline
Minimum 1 year of experience in any professional role
Advanced level of English (C1 or higher), both written and spoken
Logical thinking, fact-checking and reasoning abilities
Strong attention to detail and ability to understand and follow complex instructions
Strong communication skills, including the ability to ask clarifying questions when needed
Genuine interest in technology and artificial intelligence
Benefits
Why this freelance opportunity might be a great fit for you?
Take part in a part-time, remote, freelance project that fits around your primary professional or academic commitments
Work on advanced AI projects and gain valuable experience that enhances your portfolio
Influence how future AI models understand and communicate in your field of expertise

Benefits

  • Take part in a part-time, remote, freelance project that fits around your primary professional or academic commitments

  • Influence how future AI models understand and communicate in your field of expertise

Welcome to Engine Lifecycle Management

You will join the Lifecycle Processes and Digital Applications department within the functional area Engine Lifecycle Management. We are a part of a unified Engineering Two-Stroke organisation with the clear ambition to reflect our role as the crankshaft of the MAN ES Engine lifecycle, responsible for the overall end-to-end processes covering the full engine lifecycle.

Alongside our colleagues within the functional area, we ensure production process validation and quality in the supply chain, and safe and compliant market introduction of marine products through an efficient approval process.

We collaborate with a wide range of departments within Engineering, R&D and our after-sales organization PrimeServ. The working atmosphere is relaxed and all are committed to succeeding as a team by being supportive, flexible and sharing knowledge and experience. There is space for creativity and new ideas.
Are you a student ready to apply your theoretical knowledge in practice?

We offer you the opportunity to connect your education with valuable practical experience in a large international company, where diversity and inclusion drive innovation, enabling us to create cutting-edge energy solutions.

At Everllence we have a Student Network created by students for students. Its purpose is to connect students across Denmark, fostering strong academic and social relationships across various departments. This network also offers an opportunity to expand academic connections, potentially paving the way for a future career at Everllence.
In 2027, we will consolidate our Zealand locations into one large site in Trekroner, Roskilde.
Build your future with us
Please apply before the 1st og July 2026. Interviews will be held during the application period.
Questions? You are welcome to contact Benoit Rauturier by email benoit.rauturier@everllence.com

We aim for a fair and inclusive recruitment process. Regardless of gender, age, religion, disability, or ethnic background, we encourage you to apply. We embrace a global mindset and intercultural environment to ensure a collaborative and inclusive workplace. If you need support, such as assistive tools for dyslexia, we can assist you.

4423636291,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/student-data-scientist-at-abacus-medicine-group-4423636291?position=32&pageNum=0&refId=UbdSZWjZ%2F3fZumGCn0qyWQ%3D%3D&trackingId=ITI2G01p9Scf%2B%2FxrKJkHFA%3D%3D,Student Data Scientist,Abacus Medicine Group,Copenhagen Metropolitan Area,"Drive meaningful change

Are you curious, motivated, and eager to apply your skills in a fast-paced, innovative environment? Then this role offers a great opportunity for you to build hands‑on experience developing impactful advanced analytics solutions as they evolve from concept to integrated workflows. As part of Advanced Analytics, you’ll work within a broader Data, Analytics and AI organization and collaborate closely with experts across BI, data engineering, platform experts, and AI/GenAI specialists.
Get a glimpse of our world

As a Student Data Scientist in Advanced Analytics, you’ll join a team that works across the full analytics lifecycle - from idea exploration to developing and launching decision algorithms and ML/AI solutions used daily across the business. You'll collaborate closely with our team of data analysts, scientists and engineers, as well as product excellence and intelligence units in different business areas who combine strong technical skills with a deep understanding of business challenges.
Are you ready to embark on this journey with us?
In this role, you will contribute to the development and maintenance of user-facing ML/AI models and products, while also supporting a wide range of advanced analytics data initiatives.
Tasks you can expect to work on, on a day-to-day basis include:
Developing new features for advanced analytics products and maintaining existing ones
Prototyping and iterating with different business stakeholders on custom ML/AI Databricks Applications built on frameworks such as Plotly, Dash or Streamlit
Conducting exploratory data analyses in our Data Platform, primarily performed in Databricks
Data wrangling and refinement, including transforming, validating, and preparing data for advanced analytics and ML/AI use cases
Drive technical innovation by exploring new Databricks capabilities and helping refine best practices across the organization
Overall, this role will work in close proximity to a range of data professionals that all work together to deliver impactful Data, Analytics, & AI solutions to stakeholders across Abacus Medicine
Fuel for your success in the role

You are likely in the second or third year of your bachelor’s degree studying a relevant field such as Data Science, Business Analytics, Software Development, or similar, and are interested in working with both Data & ML/AI solutions and user‑facing advanced analytics products.
We imagine that you:
Have solid experience with Python for data analytics, data science or data visualization
Have worked with data wrangling and data analysis (e.g. in Python or SQL)
Are motivated to collaborate with business (non-technical stakeholders) to develop data-driven applications.
Enjoy solving problems, learning new technologies, and developing innovative solutions
Can collaborate with both technical colleagues and business stakeholders
Are comfortable working independently and asking questions and seeking feedback when needed.
What we offer
Hands‑on experience building and improving Advanced Analytics solutions
A modern developer experience based on cutting edge Azure & Databricks tool stack
Mentorship from experienced members of the Advanced Analytics team
Insight into how analytics solutions evolve from concept to integrated workflows
A flexible student position in a collaborative and supportive team
A strong student environment across the Abacus Medicine Group
Are you interested?

Applications are open until the end of June. We will be screening and interviewing throughout the summer, and due to the holiday period, response times may be longer than usual. Please follow the link to apply and attach your CV and cover letter.
Would you like to know more about us?
Follow us on Instagram and LinkedIn and get an insight into everyday life at Abacus Medicine. For job openings, check our Career page.
Moving Healthcare. Moving You.
In Abacus Medicine Group, you’ll experience the power of Moving Healthcare. With our change mindset, we're moving the industry and improving healthcare as we broaden access to medicine.

But it's not just about moving healthcare, it's about Moving You. You’ll be part of a caring community of more than 1,750 people across the World. With us, you will be valued, empowered, and have a direct impact on driving change. Let's access the future of medicine and make a difference together. Your move.

4414300513,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/working-student-ai-management-consulting-nordics-at-celonis-4414300513?position=33&pageNum=0&refId=UbdSZWjZ%2F3fZumGCn0qyWQ%3D%3D&trackingId=caE9syX0oQ5YaMtQIGRHTA%3D%3D,Working Student AI & Management Consulting (Nordics),Celonis,Copenhagen Metropolitan Area,"Celonis is the global leader in Process Intelligence and the pioneer of Process Mining technology. As one of the world’s fastest-growing enterprise SaaS companies, we are changemakers pushing the boundaries of what’s possible. We invest heavily in advanced AI capabilities—specifically our Process Intelligence Graph—to turn data insights into immediate business action. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock global productivity and sustainability by placing intelligence at the core of every business process. Join our mission to make processes work for people, companies, and the planet.
The Team

As a Working Student in AI & Management Consulting you join our Value Engineering team to focus on driving and closing opportunities by identifying and selling the value Celonis can bring to customers. Our Value Engineers (VE) are the trusted advisor for customers and work on the intersection of technology and business. VEs don't just understand code
column2: they understand the entire architecture of a deal. By bridging the gap between deep technical capability, customer pain points, and revenue mechanics, it stands out as one of the most high-impact roles in tech

column1: The Role
As a VE Working Student, you will sit at the intersection of data engineering, process intelligence, and business strategy. You won't just support the team
column2: you will actively build data-driven solutions within the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform to uncover hidden inefficiencies for companies across the Nordics market. This is a highly analytical role where you will translate complex business challenges into technical requirements, using SQL/PQL, data modeling, and AI capabilities to transform raw data into million-dollar business cases

column1: The work you’ll do
Mine & Model Data: Use the Celonis platform to analyze complex business processes, exposing hidden inefficiencies and engineering absolute operational transparency.
Architect Use Cases: Translate high-level customer business challenges into rigorous technical requirements, building actionable, data-driven use cases within the Process Intelligence Platform.
Deploy Advanced Analytics: Leverage Celonis data modeling, SQL/PQL, and native AI capabilities to generate deep insights and optimize enterprise-scale operations.
Align AI & Tech Strategy: Evaluate and integrate Celonis solutions and AI features to map directly into a customer’s broader enterprise technology roadmap.
Quantify Financial ROI: Transform raw data findings into hard financial metrics, building management-ready presentations that prove the exact operational value of implemented solutions.
Pitch to Stakeholders: Partner with cross-functional project teams to deliver technical findings and strategic, data-backed recommendations straight to customer decision-makers.
Bridge Tech & Business: Act as the ultimate product and analytical expert, translating complex data-driven solutions into clear corporate value.
The Qualifications You Need
Student of Business Analytics / Industrial Engineering / Business Informatics / Technology & Management / Economics / Mathematics or of a comparable program
Strong communicational skills and interest in interacting with potential customers
Experience in consulting and highly interested in Data Analytics
Knowledge in SQL and Python or related database query languages (completion of Celonis Rising Star modules would be a plus)
Confidence to present to senior stakeholders and larger audiences
Passionate for data, OpenAI and LLMs and the impact it can have on the world
Analytical mindset and the ability to multi-task, prioritize and execute
Fluent in English, with professional proficiency in a Nordic language highly preferred to effectively support our Nordics business development and stakeholders.
Availability for at least 6-8 months, ideally longer.
What Celonis can offer you:
Pioneer Innovation: Work with the global leader in Process Mining and the Process Intelligence Graph to shape the future of AI-driven business operations.
Ownership from Day 1: Every full-time Celonaut is an owner, receiving Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and merit-based refresh grants.

Unrivaled Family Support: Benefit from our inclusive parental leave policy—24 weeks of fully paid leave for primary carers and 12 weeks for supporting carers, available from your first day of employment.
Work-Life Integration: Enjoy Unlimited PTO (in applicable regions) and generous PTO globally, as well as a flexible hybrid work model that balances remote focus with vibrant office collaboration.
Continuous Growth: Elevate your skills through our 70-20-10 learning framework, mentorship programs, and access to a dedicated learning platform.
Holistic Well-being: Prioritize your health with subsidized Wellhub memberships, mental health counseling, and dedicated Wellness Weeks that prioritize work/life balance.
Drive Sustainability: Participate in annual Impact Days, where you receive paid time off to volunteer for community and environmental causes with your local office, or virtually.
Global Inclusion & Belonging: Find community through our Inclusion Think Tank and participate in our annual Inclusion Days, ensuring every voice is heard and valued.
Value-Driven Impact: Join a mission-led organization where our core values—Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future—drive every decision.
About Us:

Celonis makes processes work — for people, companies, and the planet. Powered by process mining and AI, the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform integrates process data and business context to create a living digital twin of business operations. We enable thousands of companies worldwide to understand how their business actually runs and, together with their partners, build intelligent solutions that transform and continuously improve the way they operate — unlocking billions in value. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.
Get familiar with the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform by watching this video.
Celonis Inclusion Statement:

At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up and knows their voice is heard - that's when creativity and innovation happen.
Your Privacy:
Any information you submit to Celonis as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Celonis’ Accessibility and Candidate Notices
By submitting this application, you confirm that you agree to the storing and processing of your personal data by Celonis as described in our Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process.
Please be aware of common job offer scams, impersonators and frauds. Learn more here.

  • Confidence to present to senior stakeholders and larger audiences
  • Passionate for data, OpenAI and LLMs and the impact it can have on the world
  • Analytical mindset and the ability to multi-task, prioritize and execute
  • Fluent in English, with professional proficiency in a Nordic language highly preferred to effectively support our Nordics business development and stakeholders.
  • Availability for at least 6-8 months, ideally longer.

    • What Celonis can offer you:

    • Pioneer Innovation: Work with the global leader in Process Mining and the Process Intelligence Graph to shape the future of AI-driven business operations.
    • Ownership from Day 1: Every full-time Celonaut is an owner, receiving Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and merit-based refresh grants.
    • Unrivaled Family Support: Benefit from our inclusive parental leave policy—24 weeks of fully paid leave for primary carers and 12 weeks for supporting carers, available from your first day of employment.
    • Work-Life Integration: Enjoy Unlimited PTO (in applicable regions) and generous PTO globally, as well as a flexible hybrid work model that balances remote focus with vibrant office collaboration.
    • Continuous Growth: Elevate your skills through our 70-20-10 learning framework, mentorship programs, and access to a dedicated learning platform.
    • Holistic Well-being: Prioritize your health with subsidized Wellhub memberships, mental health counseling, and dedicated Wellness Weeks that prioritize work/life balance.
    • Drive Sustainability: Participate in annual Impact Days, where you receive paid time off to volunteer for community and environmental causes with your local office, or virtually.
    • Global Inclusion &
column9:
Belonging: Find community through our Inclusion Think Tank and participate in our annual Inclusion Days, ensuring every voice is heard and valued.
  • Value-Driven Impact: Join a mission-led organization where our core values—Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future—drive every decision.

    • About Us:

    Celonis makes processes work — for people, companies, and the planet. Powered by process mining and AI, the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform integrates process data and business context to create a living digital twin of business operations. We enable thousands of companies worldwide to understand how their business actually runs and, together with their partners, build intelligent solutions that transform and continuously improve the way they operate — unlocking billions in value. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.

    Get familiar with the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform by watching this video.

    Celonis Inclusion Statement:

    At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up and knows their voice is heard - that's when creativity and innovation happen.

    Your Privacy:

    Any information you submit to Celonis as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Celonis’ Accessibility and Candidate Notices

    By submitting this application, you confirm that you agree to the storing and processing of your personal data by Celonis as described in our Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process.

    Please be aware of common job offer scams, impersonators and frauds. Learn more here.

4427485632,https://dk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/junior-bi-specialist-til-business-intelligence-i-dlg-at-dlg-group-4427485632?position=35&pageNum=0&refId=UbdSZWjZ%2F3fZumGCn0qyWQ%3D%3D&trackingId=%2FDXiM%2B4%2FpIkrZMicmDAAlQ%3D%3D,Junior BI Specialist til Business Intelligence i DLG,DLG Group,"Fredericia, Region of Southern Denmark, Denmark","Vil du bruge dine kompetencer indenfor data, tech og rapportering til at gøre en reel forskel for medarbejdere og ledere på tværs af DLG Group? Som vores nye Junior BI Specialist træder du direkte ind i hjertet af DLG’s strategi, ”Creating the Future”. Her handler data ikke bare om tal, men om at skabe gennemsigtighed, bæredygtige løsninger og en god brugeroplevelse.
Kort fortalt
I rollen som konsulent vil du få ansvaret for et eller flere data domainer, hvor du driver udvikling af innovative løsninger og tilsikrer succesfuld implementering.
Du vil stå for den løbende dialog med brugere omkring kravspecifikationer og support.
Du bliver en del af et ambitiøst og uformelt BI-team med omkring 8-9 kollegaer i et internationalt setup, der vægter faglighed og trivsel højt.
Det er en udviklingsrolle, som giver dig gode muligheder for at påvirke retningen.
Din hverdag og opgaver

I Rollen Som Junior BI Specialist Vil Du Arbejde Tæt Sammen Med Kollegaer i BI Teamet Og Kollegaer På Tværs Af DLG Groups Afdelinger. Dine Opgaver Og Kontaktflade i Organisationen Vil Spænde Bredt Og Omfatte Udvikling Af Nye Løsninger, Samt Supportere Brugerne
Drive egne projekter på tværs af organisationen, herunder styre tid, ressourcer og kvalitet.
Udvikling af brugervenlige og innovative løsninger i Power BI.
Sikre brugen af rapporter igennem træning og dialog med forretningen.
Udarbejde kravspecifikationer, mock-ups og dokumentation.
Hvem er du?
Vi leder efter en profil, der trives i arbejdet med data og teknologi. Du trives i et miljø, hvor samarbejde er vigtigt og du kan sætte dit præg på tingene.
Du har erfaring eller kendskab til Microsoft suiten med fokus på Power BI og Power Apps
Kendskab til andre værktøjer er et plus (Analysis for Office, SAC eller lignende)
Du kommunikerer ubesværet på engelsk, både i skrift og tale. Tysk er et plus.
Du kommer med et positivt mindset, drive og er nysgerrig omkring teknologiudviklingen.
Du er nyuddannet eller kommer med 1-2års erfaring.
Du har en relevant uddannelse inden for Business Intelligence, IT eller økonomi
Hvad vi tilbyder
Hos DLG Bliver Du En Del Af En Arbejdsplads, Hvor Ambitioner Og Trivsel Følges Ad. Vi Tilbyder Attraktive Vilkår, Herunder
En favorabel pensionsordning og en omfattende forsikringspakke.
Gode ferieforhold samt fuld løn under barsel og fædreorlov.
En unik arbejdsplads i vores prisbelønnede domicil i Fredericia med fitnessrum og en fantastisk kantine.
Et stærkt socialt fællesskab med personaleforening, sportsklub og kunstforening.
Medarbejderrabatter, blandt andet i vores Land & Fritid-butikker.
Om DLG Group

DLG er et af Europas største landbrugsselskaber og ejes af de danske landmænd. Med vores strategi ”Creating the Future” har vi sat en ambitiøs retning for at levere de løsninger, der skal til for at sikre en bæredygtig fremtid for landbruget, energisektoren og byggeriet. Vi er en international koncern med rødderne solidt plantet i den danske muld, og vi arbejder hver dag på at skabe værdi for vores ejere og samfundet.
Vil du vide mere? Har du spørgsmål til stillingen, er du velkommen til at kontakte Rasmus Pedersen på telefon +45 5215 9296. Vi glæder os til at høre fra dig.
